head: Development Innovation Analyst – Insight Intelligence
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 1 天前 · 15 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

If you have a strong background in clinical research and development and are passionate about driving AI-powered innovation to shape the future of clinical development, we encourage you to explore this unique opportunity. Through dynamic, hands-on collaboration with AI engineers, you will co-create advanced AI solutions—including next-generation Agentic AI tools and capabilities —aimed to transform how we work.

In this role, you will leverage your expertise as an experienced clinical researcher—such as a disease lead or study physician—serving as the clinical domain expert within a multidisciplinary project team comprising AI engineers and technology partners. Together, you will define, design, develop, deliver, and rigorously evaluate AI-driven solutions that advance clinical research and development. Your contributions will have a meaningful impact across the entire clinical development value chain, encompassing areas such as strategic planning, study design, clinical trial monitoring, interpretation of study findings, and regulatory engagement on clinical matters, among others.

您将以资深临床研究者（如疾病领域负责人或临床医学负责人）的专业视角，作为临床领域专家，携手AI工程师及技术专家，共同打造能够赋能临床研究的新型工具与创新模式。您将深度参与业务流程的梳理与优化，精准识别关键环节中的痛点，并与技术团队紧密协作，从定义、设计到开发与交付，推动AI解决方案在临床试验领域的实际应用落地，加速数字化与人工智能技术的创新转化和业务持续优化。 您所影响的将是临床开发的全价值链，包括但不限于临床开发策略制定、研究方案设计、临床研究监查、研究结果的深入解读，以及与监管机构在临床环节的沟通协作等多个核心领域。

梳理并提炼资深临床研究者在临床研发过程中的决策和工作流背后的逻辑和路径，精准识别业务痛点和优化空间

在业务与用户需求的驱动下，与AI工程师及跨部门技术、业务专家密切协作，深度参与可行且标准化最佳实践的分析、定义与设计，并不断推动完善和升级
为新型AI能力的测试体系建设提供专业支持，包括标准与文档体系的搭建，以及推动行业benchmark的制定和完善
组织并协调跨职能团队，积极引领创新方案的探索与讨论，持续推动产品的优化与升级
面对挑战，以目标为导向，凭借创新意识、优秀的跨部门协作能力、务实精神与高效沟通来推动项目持续迭代和高质量兑现，确保MVP方案能够快速产出，并持续提升业务与技术融合的整体水平

6. 组织并协调跨职能团队，积极引领创新方案的探索与讨论，持续推动产品的优化与升级
7. 面对挑战，以目标为导向，凭借创新意识、优秀的跨部门协作能力、务实精神与高效沟通来推动项目持续迭代和高质量兑现，确保MVP方案能够快速产出，并持续提升业务与技术融合的整体水平
1. 具备扎实的新药研发临床科学背景，曾担任 disease lead，study physician，clinical development strategy lead等角色，在临床开发策略决策、研究方案设计、临床研究监查、临床解读以及与监管部门沟通等环节有丰富的实践经验
2. 熟悉立项和临床试验设计背后的科学考量，能够梳理和提取最佳实践和经验，精准识别业务痛点
3. 对新技术转化为实际产出充满热情
4. 对人工智能、数字健康、临床科学的创新工具或平台有浓厚兴趣，具备以终为始推动数字化转型和智能化变革的前瞻视野
5. 具有医疗背景且在医疗健康数字创新、AI赋能流程、项目管理等实践经历者优先

head: Talent Intelligence & Supply Chain Management Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 · 4 个月前 · 99 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
NEWLY CREATED ROLE - JOIN US TODAY
Location:
China (Flexible within Mainland China-preferable Shanghai)
About the Role:

Randstad Sourceright is seeking a dynamic and analytical professional to join our team in China. This unique dual-role opportunity offers a blend of market intelligence and supply chain management (SCM) responsibilities, supporting our talent solutions portfolio across RPO, MSP, and SOW programs.

The successful candidate will spend 50% of their time focused on talent intelligence, generating insights and market reports across multiple industry sectors, and 50% supporting the SCM desk, managing vendor relationships and performance in China.
This role plays a pivotal part in shaping data-driven decision-making for our clients in Life Sciences, High-Value Manufacturing, Banking & Financial Services, and ICT.
Key Responsibilities:
1. Talent Intelligence & Insights (50%)
1. Collect, analyze, and synthesize labor market data, salary trends, competitor intelligence, and workforce insights to create high-impact reports for internal and client use.
2. Develop sector-specific talent dashboards and insight packs aligned to the needs of clients in Life Sciences, HVM, BFSI, and ICT.
3. Provide strategic advisory support during program implementation and optimization phases.
4. Collaborate with global talent intelligence teams to localize global insights for the China market.
5. Present findings to internal stakeholders and clients to inform workforce planning and talent strategy.
2. Supply Chain Management Support (50%)
1. Act as the China-based point of contact for all vendor management activities under the SCM function.
2. Support vendor onboarding, contract compliance, rate management, and performance tracking.
3. Monitor and improve supplier performance metrics (e.g., fulfillment rates, time-to-fill, quality of hire).
4. Partner with the global SCM team to align vendor strategy with broader program goals and local market dynamics.
5. Support escalations, audits, and continuous improvement initiatives with our vendor base in China.
Key Relationships:
1. Dual reporting to APAC Heads of Talent Intelligence and SCM.
2. Day-to-day collaboration with the Enterprise China Country Head.
3. Frequent engagement with client-facing delivery teams, vendors, and cross-functional stakeholders globally.
Requirements:
1. Bachelor’s degree in Business, Economics, Human Resources, Data Science, or related field.
2. 3–5+ years’ experience in talent analytics, market research, workforce insights, or supply chain/vendor management within the HR/talent acquisition space.
3. Familiarity with RPO, MSP, and SOW models is highly desirable.
4. Strong analytical and reporting skills using tools like Excel, Power BI, Tableau, or similar.
5. Excellent communication and presentation abilities, both in Mandarin and English.
6. Ability to navigate a matrixed environment and manage multiple stakeholders.
Apply Now

job_details_content: ##              职位简介
What is Build the Future?
Build the Future
is one of the
Prysmian Graduate Programs
, now in its 15th edition!
We aim to hire talents globally with
diverse background and experiences
who are eager to
make our world a more sustainable place
and ready to embrace new challenges.

Energy transition
and
Digitalization of our communities

Program Overview
Our Graduate Program provides an immersive experience in our company from day 1.
The program starts with a
one-week Global Induction
in Milan with trainings and activities led by the Prysmian Academy in collaboration with a Top-Ranking Business School.
Following your induction, you will be part of a
one-year job rotation
in 2 different departments: Research & Development and Operations in one of our production sites.

After the first year of rotation, you will take a role in the Country you have been hired in for 12 months aligned to business needs and your interests. The position will be technical, mainly based in one of our production sites, strongly linked to the core of our business.
Then, after completing your second year, you will start your
international assignment for a duration of 3 years
in one of our 50+ countries.
You will learn new ways of working, acquire technical knowledge, meet colleagues all over the world in a multi-cultural environment!
At the end of your assignment abroad,
returning to the country you have been hired in
, you will be ready to take on a new responsibility in the technical area continuing your career in Prysmian.
What else is in for you?
A competitive reward package, including a bonus opportunity.
A training plan tailored for you in partnership with a Top-Ranking Business School.
Opportunity to continuously develop your knowledge through the Prysmian local schools.
A buddy who will help you to settle in quickly during the first year of your journey and a mentor who will provide guidance, support and knowledge to help you grow and develop as professional.
A wide range of training and career development opportunities based on performance.
Benefits when moving abroad for your international experience.
A global network of 300+ other colleagues who have already joined our graduate program.

You are keen on joining a career in our manufacturing industry and you are ready to embrace a new challenge.
You are eager to be trained on a technical role.
You have graduated in the last 24 months, or you are completing a degree in STEM (Science, Technology, Engineering and Math) fields.
You speak English fluently.
You have worked or studied abroad and/or you are willing to join an international experience with Prysmian.
You have excellent communication and presentation skills.
You enjoy learning and working with other colleagues.

You are passionate about diversity and inclusion and keen on joining a multicultural environment.

By leveraging its wide geographical footprint and extensive product range, its track record of technological leadership and innovation, and a strong customer base, the company is well-placed to capitalise on its leading positions and win in new, growing markets. head: TGT-Tech Genius Team
info: 中国 北京市 · 4 个月前 · 25 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
【for this position,Mandarin is required! Base in China Mainland!】
1、About JD.com

JD.com (NASDAQ: JD and HKEX: 9618), also known as JINGDONG, has evolved from a pioneering e commerce platform into a leading technology and service provider with supply chain at its core. Renowned for its supply chain innovation and excellence, JD.com has expanded into sectors including retail, technology, logistics, healthcare, and more, aiming to transform traditional business models with cutting edge digital solutions. Ranked 47th on the Fortune Global 500, JD.com is China’s largest retailer by revenue. In 2023, JD.com reported revenues of US$152.8 billion and served approximately 600 million active customers.
2、TGT (Tech Genius Team）Program

Tech Genius Team (TGT) Program is a global technical talent initiative. We seek to collaborate with visionary technologists to explore cutting edge innovations through JD’s vast business ecosystems, leveraging technology to create meaningful societal impact.
TGT focuses on the most cutting edge topics with societal value. Our research areas include:
1）AI Infra

Responsible for the architecture design and optimization of JD.com's AI infrastructure, promoting the efficient implementation of deep learning frameworks in training and inference stages, and customizing development to meet business scenarios to enhance model performance and resource utilization, providing robust underlying support for JD.com's intelligent business operations.
2）Security AI

Focus on building a comprehensive security protection system for JD.com's platform, employing advanced algorithms and AI models to monitor and guard against various security threats in real-time, ensuring user data privacy and transaction security, and safeguarding the stable operation of the business, thereby fortifying the security line of defense for JD.com's e-commerce operations.
3）Big Data Platform Development and Optimization

Deeply involved in the construction and optimization of JD.com's big data platform, responsible for the collection, storage, processing, and analysis of massive amounts of data, mining data value to provide data support for business scenarios such as precision marketing, supply chain optimization, and user profiling, assisting JD.com in achieving data-driven decision-making and operations.
4）Multi-modal Large Model Development and Applications

Explore innovative applications of multi-modal large models in JD.com's business, such as product image recognition, video content understanding, and multi-modal recommendations. By integrating text, image, and voice data, enhance the model's perception and understanding capabilities to deliver a more intelligent and enriched shopping experience for users.
5）High-Performance Computing and Cloud Innovation

Dedicated to performance optimization and technological innovation of JD.com's cloud computing platform, building an efficient and reliable cloud infrastructure to support large-scale distributed computing and storage, meeting the growing business demand for computing resources while reducing operational costs, and driving the development of JD.com's business towards cloud-native.
6）Machine Learning and Sys Analytics

Conduct in-depth research and application of machine learning algorithms, targeting business scenarios such as user growth, risk control, and supply chain optimization at JD.com. Design and develop efficient predictive models and decision-making systems, providing precise insights and strategic recommendations through data mining and model optimization to enhance business efficiency and competitiveness.
7）World Foundation Models and Embodied AI

Investigate the application of spatial intelligence technologies in JD.com's logistics and warehousing scenarios, such as robot path planning and intelligent warehouse management. By constructing spatial perception and decision-making models, achieve automated and intelligent spatial operations to improve logistics efficiency and warehouse utilization, advancing the development of JD.com's smart logistics.
8）Search, Recommendation, and Advertising Optimization

Focus on algorithm optimization and innovation of JD.com's search, recommendation, and advertising systems, employing advanced machine learning, reinforcement learning, and deep learning techniques to enhance the accuracy of search results, relevance of recommendations, and effectiveness of ad placements, optimizing user experience and increasing the commercial value and user stickiness of the platform.
3、Eligibility
⚫Full time: Graduation dates between October 2023 September 2026.
⚫Internship: Graduation dates after September 2026.
⚫Open to all degree levels. Preferred majors include Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, Automation, Mathematics, or related fields.

Track and report on business network-supplier enablement and adoption rates.

Bridge effectively with Procurement, Accounts Payable, Legal, and other internal teams to ensure smooth supplier operations.

Work in a project environment and supporting system/process enablement by designing and implementing the guided project.
Extensive delivery through analyzing issues in a complex business process and preparing functional updates, user article knowledge, and reports.

Experience in procurement, supply chain, or other supplier management-related roles.

Ability to work independently and as part of a team.

Good communication skills to communicate with customers, team members, external data providers, and management.
Good skills in data administration, design, and master data recording.
Good analytical and problem-solving skills.

Added advantage of having Coupa ERP system module knowledge.

4. Coordinate with internal departments (e.g., Legal, Finance, Compliance) to ensure all necessary approvals and system updates are completed for new suppliers.
5. Execute regular updates, changes, and deactivations of existing supplier records in the relevant ERP/Procurement systems (e.g., SAP Ariba, Coupa,)
6. Perform periodic data cleansing and validation activities to ensure data accuracy, consistency, and eliminate redundancies.
7. Respond to internal and external inquiries related to supplier data, providing accurate and timely information.
8. Monitor and action requests for supplier data modifications received through various channels.
9. Identify opportunities to streamline and improve supplier onboarding and data maintenance processes for greater efficiency and accuracy.

10. Conduct training sessions (virtual and/or in-person as needed) for suppliers on how to effectively use the business network functionalities (e.g., invoice submission, order confirmation, catalog management, performance monitoring).
11. Develop and maintain(translation) comprehensive training materials, user guides and video tutorials for supplier enablement initiatives.
12. Track and report on business network-supplier enablement and adoption rates.
13. Function as the primary point of contact for supplier inquiries and technical support related to the supplier enablement and adoption initiatives.
14. Identify opportunities to enhance the supplier enablement experience and streamline related processes (e.g., onboarding workflows, communication methods)
15. Participate in system testing and upgrades related to supplier master data.
16. Bridge effectively with Procurement, Accounts Payable, Legal, and other internal teams to ensure smooth supplier operations.
17. Troubleshoot and resolve any issues or discrepancies during the onboarding process in a timely manner.
18. Work in a project environment and supporting system/process enablement by designing and implementing the guided project.
19. Extensive delivery through analyzing issues in a complex business process and preparing functional updates, user article knowledge, and reports.
20. Perform Ticket management for Level 1 Helpdesk requests.
21. Business on demand support to Contracts Management: Contracts maintenance, Data analysis , Analytics.
22. Maintain the weekly Status and daily reports for traceability and analysis purposes of the incidents.
1. Experience in procurement, supply chain, or other supplier management-related roles.
2. Possess good English listening, speaking, reading, and writing skills.
3. Good skills in computer, Microsoft office tools, SharePoint, ERP systems – SAP.
4. Ability to work independently and as part of a team.
5. Good skills in computer, Microsoft office tools, SharePoint, ERP systems – SAP /SAP Ariba.
6. Good communication skills to communicate with customers, team members, external data providers, and management.
7. Good skills in data administration, design, and master data recording.
8. Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
9. Added advantage if the candidate has experience in SAP / SAP Ariba system modules configuration to understand the initiatives and align with business expectations.
10. Added advantage of having Coupa ERP system module knowledge.
11. Added advantage of experience in conducting the training and internal technical sessions within the team for SAP/ SAP Ariba technical support.
12. Experience in Ticket management skill – Added advantage of having SERVICE NOW tool

At Roche you can show up as yourself, embraced for the unique qualities you bring. Our culture encourages personal expression, open dialogue, and genuine connections, where you are valued, accepted and respected for who you are, allowing you to thrive both personally and professionally. This is how we aim to prevent, stop and cure diseases and ensure everyone has access to healthcare today and for generations to come. Join Roche, where every voice matters.
The Position
Job Description
Roche Data Scientists are essential leaders in driving and implementing a broad range of quantitative drug development strategies
they bring data to life and enable the organization to make the best possible data-driven decisions.
As a Data Scientist at Roche Pharma, you’ll actively shape the future of healthcare as a member of Data and Statistical Sciences (DSS) within Product Development (PD) and PD Data Sciences (PDD).
You will be responsible for the strategic and analytical activities of the molecules and devices in our pipeline on a level matching your seniority.

DSS activities span multiple therapeutic areas, a wide range of data types, and collaborations with a variety of experts, all with the goal to develop innovative healthcare solutions for patients and society.

Your responsibilities in support of our PDD products may include a wide variety of contributions: partnering with key stakeholders, working on the molecule portfolio, supporting specialized business areas, or contributing to key initiatives that shape our technical, business and healthcare environments. You may be a work product owner and leader, quantitative expert on a project team, or driver of key internal or external relationships.

A healthier future drives us to innovate. info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Description
Change the world. Love your job.

In your first year with TI, you will participate in the Career Accelerator Program (CAP), which provides professional and technical training and resources to accelerate your ramp into TI, and set you up for long-term career success. Within this program, we also offer function-specific technical training and on-the-job learning opportunities that will encourage you to solve problems through a variety of hands-on, meaningful experiences from your very first day on the job.
As an Operations Analyst, your role may be in one or more of these areas:
Inventory Operations: Set the operating plan to get the right products to our customers on time
focus on new products ramps and improving cycle times on existing products
work in tandem with manufacturing planning to execute the start plan.
Manufacturing Operations: Ensure start plan execution at factories
analyze factory optimization and monitor product support at key manufacturing sites

Customer Operations: Increase customer satisfaction by identifying weaknesses in customers' supply chain and implementing optimal supply chain solutions for each site/program/device. Learn customer's end business markets and utilize this knowledge to assist business forecasting and anticipating disruptions.

Logistics: Improving inbound/outbound transportation flows, along with optimizing the network of finished goods between factories and TI product distribution centers, and managing delivery of TI products directly to customers.
Put your talent to work with Texas Instruments!
Qualifications
Minimum requirements:
Bachelor's degree in Operations, Industrial Engineering, Supply Chain, Business Analytics or related field
Cumulative 3.0/4.0 GPA or higher
Fresh graduates or graduates with less than 2 years working experience
Preferred Qualifications
Ability to establish strong relationships with key stakeholders critical to success, both internally and externally
Strong verbal and written communication skills
Ability to quickly ramp on new systems and processes
Demonstrated strong interpersonal, analytical and problem-solving skills
Ability to work in teams and collaborate effectively with people in different functions
Ability to take the initiative and drive for results
Strong time management skills that enable on-time project delivery
About Us
Why TI?
Engineer your future. We empower our employees to truly own their career and development. Come collaborate with some of the smartest people in the world to shape the future of electronics.

We're different by design. Diverse backgrounds and perspectives are what push innovation forward and what make TI stronger. We value each and every voice, and look forward to hearing yours. Meet the people of TI
Benefits that benefit you. We offer competitive pay and benefits designed to help you and your family live your best life. Your well-being is important to us.
About Texas Instruments

Texas Instruments Incorporated (Nasdaq: TXN) is a global semiconductor company that designs, manufactures and sells analog and embedded processing chips for markets such as industrial, automotive, personal electronics, communications equipment and enterprise systems. At our core, we have a passion to create a better world by making electronics more affordable through semiconductors. This passion is alive today as each generation of innovation builds upon the last to make our technology more reliable, more affordable and lower power, making it possible for semiconductors to go into electronics everywhere. Learn more at TI.com .
Texas Instruments is an equal opportunity employer and supports a diverse, inclusive work environment.
If you are interested in this position, please apply to this requisition.

company_box_content: We are BAT, a leading global consumer goods company driven by a clear purpose: to create A Better Tomorrow™ by Building a Smokeless World.

Founded in 1902, we’ve grown into a truly international business, operating across six continents with a presence in over 180 markets. Our strategic ambition is to become a predominantly smokeless business by 2035**, helping adult smokers transition to scientifically substantiated, reduced-risk*† alternatives.

With a powerful portfolio of global brands, a future-focused strategy, and around 50,000 talented people worldwide, we are committed to accelerating Tobacco Harm Reduction and making cigarettes a thing of the past.
As a leading FTSE company, our operations span three key regions:
🌍 United States of America
🌍 Americas & Europe (AME)
🌍 Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa (APMEA)
Together, we are building A Better Tomorrow™.
* Based on the weight of evidence and assuming a complete switch from cigarette smoking. These products are not risk free and are addictive.

**Please refer to the cautionary statement contained in the Annual Report and Form 20-F 2024 on p.447 for additional information regarding BAT’s future performance: https://www.bat.com/ar/2024/index.html

† Our Vapour product Vuse (including Alto, Solo, Ciro and Vibe), and certain products, including Velo, Grizzly, Kodiak, and Camel Snus, which are sold in the U.S., are subject to FDA regulation and no reduced-risk claims will be made as to these products without agency clearance.

company_box_content: Henkel operates worldwide with leading innovations, brands and technologies in two business areas: Adhesive Technologies and Consumer Brands.

Founded in 1876, Henkel looks back on more than 145 years of success. The company holds leading positions with its two business units in both industrial and consumer businesses thanks to strong brands, innovations and technologies such as Persil, Schwarzkopf and Loctite. Henkel, headquartered in Düsseldorf / Germany, counts among the most internationally aligned German-based companies in the global marketplace.

Our company purpose expresses what unites us all at Henkel: Pioneers at heart for the good of generations. We are a diverse team of about 47,000 colleagues worldwide, striving to enrich and improve life every day through our products, services, and solutions. Our Purpose is built from our roots and carries a long-standing legacy of innovation, responsibility, and sustainability into the future. Our shared values and Leadership Commitments guide our decisions and actions every day.

4. 面向国际化团队，与海外HR团队协同，共同设计和落地兼顾公司导向和本地化的组织管理方案，满足业务团队的发展诉求，增强团队凝聚力。
任职要求：
1. 本科及以上学历，海外留学背景优先；
2. 需具备至少3年HRBP经验，时尚/电商/互联网行业优先；
3. 英语能够作为工作语言，听说读写均能流利沟通；
4. 沟通能力强，善于整合资源与他人合作达成结果；
5. 善于分析及识别问题的本质从而输出有效的解决方案。

head: 数据库程序员
info: 中国 上海市 · 3 个月前 · 6 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
岗位目的：
依照信达SOP执行和参与信达临床项目的数据管理工作。通过编写SAS等程序，生成临床数据管理所需要的报表和报告等。必要时，根据项目的需求，参与构建、测试数据库（EDC）和逻辑核查以及项目过程中数据库的维护，参与管理信达的数据库系统URL和信达临床项目数据库相关工作账号，确保项目顺利进行；参与平台工具的开发；服务器运维；临床试验数据的分析呈现。
主要工作职责：
一、依照SOP执行临床项目数据管理工作
1. 根据项目的要求和数据管理项目经理沟通，通过编写SAS程序等，生成临床数据管理所需要的各种报表和报告等，确保满足项目需求。

2. 参与数据库（EDC）创建、验证和上线；测试数据库的构建和检查逻辑核查的编程，确保数据界面和逻辑核查满足项目的要求；参与项目URL开通、维护、锁定等管理工作；参与各个项目的数据库（EDC）系统使用周期的维护，确保满足项目需求；根据项目的需求和数据管理项目经理沟通，参与数据库的修订，版本升级和数据迁移，包括数据导入导出，与其他系统的对接，确保项目顺利推进；管理并协助数据库（EDC）相关工作推进，包括但不限于：权限申请、开通与变更，系统培训，版本控制管理，确保满足项目需求。
3. 必要时，参与部门平台工具的开发、测试及验证工作。
4. 必要时，维护管理数据库服务器的日常运行，并与IT部门协商与确定数据库（EDC）相关的数据信息保密要求及系统运维协作，使得项目数据得以保障。
二、标准化搭建
1. 根据需求，参与维护eCRF、逻辑核查标准库，使得项目标准化管理；
2. 必要时，协助搭建标准化工作流程。
三、新人带教
1、参与团队新人的带教工作，作为培训师对新人进行培训。
任职资格：
1. 学历及专业：本科或硕士学历，医药或IT相关专业
2. 专业知识：熟悉GCP相关法规要求、主流EDC系统构建与编程、SAS编程、CDISC、GCDMP等临床数据管理相关知识。
3. 工作经验：5年以上EDC建库经验，熟悉SAS编程或数据库（主流EDC系统）构建与编程。
4. 技能要求：
娴熟的办公设备及办公软件操作技能；
良好的理解力，注重细节，能够很好的处理多项工作；
良好的人际交往和沟通能力；
高效工作的能力；
良好的英语沟通及阅读能力。

head: Product Analyst
info: 中国 北京市 · 3 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Are you a data detective who loves turning numbers into narratives and insights into action? Do you get a thrill from uncovering the "why" behind business trends and using that knowledge to shape strategy?
We are looking for a sharp and driven
Product Analyst to empower our teams with data-driven intelligence working at our HQ in Dubai, UAE

. In this role, you will be the cornerstone of decision-making, providing the analytical firepower that guides our product roadmap and business strategy. You'll go beyond reporting—you'll be a strategic partner, using data to identify opportunities, mitigate risks, and tell the story of where we should go next.
If you have a consultant's problem-solving skills and a passion for the product lifecycle, this is your opportunity to make a tangible impact.
What You'll Do:
1. Analyze complex datasets, core metrics, and business drivers to generate actionable insights that answer our most pressing questions.
2. Develop and maintain intuitive dashboards, reports, and analytical frameworks that empower teams across the company to make smarter, faster decisions.
3. Partner directly with Product Managers and business leaders to identify growth opportunities, potential risks, and areas for optimization.
4. Provide research and analysis on market trends and leverage AI-driven analytical techniques to keep us at the forefront of innovation.
Who You Are (Qualifications):
1. You have experience in a highly analytical role (e.g., Business Analyst, Data Analyst, Strategy Analyst) within a consulting firm, tech company, or product-led organization.

2. You possess a strong quantitative background and are proficient in SQL, Python, R, or other data analysis tools. Experience with data visualization platforms (e.g., Tableau, Looker, Power BI) is essential.
3. You are a structured problem-solver who breaks down complex, ambiguous problems into actionable steps—consulting experience is a major plus.
4. You take ownership of your work from start to finish, demonstrating accountability for your insights and their impact.
5. You have an enterprise mindset: you're resilient, proactive, and have the drive to "find a way" to get to the answer.
Ideal Backgrounds Include:
1. Former analysts from top-tier consulting firms with exposure to tech, data, or AI projects.
2. Analysts from product-first organizations (e.g., tech-enabled consumer companies, SaaS businesses) who are skilled at partnering with product teams.
Why Join Us?
1. Strategic Influence: Your analysis will directly inform key product and business decisions, giving you a front-row seat to our strategy.
2. Skill Growth: Hone your technical skills while developing deep business acumen and strategic thinking in a high-impact environment.
3. Collaborative Culture: Join a team that values curiosity, intellectual rigor, and data-driven debate.
About Us-
Landmark Group

Our journey started in 1973 with a single store in Bahrain. Since then, we have grown into a global retail and hospitality group. The proud creator of 25 plus value led, own-built brands across retail, hospitality, food, and leisure.

Over the years, our UAE - based group has evolved into a comprehensive retail and hospitality entity, with over 2200 retail stores, leisure, and hospitality outlets, panning the GCC, Middle East, India, Southeast Asia, and Africa. Today, Landmark Group is one of GCC's largest omnichannel retailers and India's top home and fashion retailer.

We take immense pride in the organic growth of our retail brands, which have blossomed into household names. From Max, Splash, Babyshop, Centrepoint, Shoemart, Home Centre, Emax, Fitness First, to Fun City, to name a few, our brands span across a multitude of categories, enriching the lives of countless families over the past decade.
As a part of the Landmark Group, a renowned retail and hospitality conglomerate in the Middle East, North Africa, and India,
Landmark Digital is the dynamic digital arm of Landmark Retail,
serving as the cornerstone of our omnichannel business strategy.

Headquartered in Dubai, UAE, we oversee the digital operations of eight leading brands across diverse geographies, with ambitious plans for expansion into new territories and functions. Joining us means becoming a vital part of the Middle East's most significant bricks-to-clicks success story, boasting an impressive year-on-year growth rate exceeding 100%.

Comprising a talented workforce of over 700 professionals across diverse domains, Landmark Digital spearheads various functions including Enterprise and E-commerce Tech, Product Management, User Design, and MarTech, among others. With our futuristic outlook, we are committed to delivering seamless digital experiences to our customers.
Landmark Digital
At
Landmark Digital,
we cultivate an
agile work culture

, empowering you to make impactful decisions from day one within collaborative squads comprising professionals from over 20 nationalities. Additionally, our dedicated software development center in Bangalore, India, offers opportunities for incubation, design, and optimization of digital products.
Working at Landmark Digital means
engaging with cutting-edge technologies

, including Enterprise and E-commerce tech, headless commerce, Java Spring Boot, React Native, React frontend, and Azure Cloud solutions, providing an enriching environment for professional growth and development.
In addition to
competitive remuneration and benefits
, we prioritize
continuous learning and growth
through dedicated training and upskilling initiatives. Furthermore, our
vibrant workplace culture
fosters camaraderie through various team events, celebrations, and recreational amenities, ensuring a fulfilling experience both personally and professionally.
Come be a part of Landmark Digital, where innovation, collaboration, and growth converge to redefine the digital retail landscape

head: 卖方证券分析师 Sell-side equity research analyst
info: 中国 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
岗位职责:
The offshore analyst will support a bulge-bracket international investment bank's equity research team with specific sector focus:

Gathering and analyzing financial data on covered companies under specific sector from a variety of sources, including company reports, the internet, online databases and proprietary databases e.g. WIND, Bloomberg, etc.
Updating and maintaining industry/sector databases using proprietary databases and the internet research (industry association websites, govt. websites, third-party industry data providers, etc.)
Working on daily/ weekly/ monthly news highlights and reports (updating key charts/graphs, preparing news summary and insights)
Performing research on companies with significant price movement, try to get key news/events leading to this movement, call company IR, if required, etc.
Following the earning calendar of the companies, listening, and summarizing earnings conference calls, and updating the financial models and reports accordingly

Building, maintaining, and analyzing financial models of companies in the given industry/sector but for different markets e.g. A-share, H-share, TW, etc. Additionally, doing earnings adjustments, etc. and helping client team with publishing models.
Writing factual sections and update content (text, tables, and charts) for company and industry reports
Helping client team on some basic admin tasks related to updating client contact details and NDR requests
任职要求:
Bachelors/Masters with a major of accounting, finance or related
Good understanding of finance and accounting (financial statements, its inter-linkages, ratios, etc.)
Good financial modeling and valuation skills
High attention to details
Good written and spoken English, Chinese skills
should be able to express thoughts in a logical and clear manner
Relevant equity research internship or working experience

Needs to have positive mindset, able to take complete ownership and responsibility for allocated work, willing to accept challenges, self-motivator and should have strong passion for equity research, and learning and growth

head: Financial Planning and Analysis (FP&A) and PPM
info: 中国 上海市 · 3 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Title:
China Financial Planning & Analysis (FP&A) and Performance Management Director
Department:
Finance
Job Summary

The professional is responsible for providing strategic financial insights, forecasting, budgeting, and analytical support to drive business decisions. This role involves collaborating with cross-functional teams to analyze financial performance, identify trends, and support the company’s long-term financial goals. The ideal candidate will have strong analytical skills, a deep understanding of financial modeling, and the ability to communicate complex financial information effectively.
Key Responsibilities
A. Budgeting
1. Lead the annual budgeting process, working closely with APAC Function heads to align financial plans with business objectives.
2. Monitor and report on budget performance, identifying risks and opportunities.
B. Financial Analysis
1. Conduct in-depth financial analysis to support decision-making, including profitability analysis, cost optimization, and scenario modeling.
2. Evaluate key business drivers, trends, and performance metrics to identify areas for improvement.
3. Perform ad-hoc financial analysis to support strategic initiatives, such as capital investments, or new product launches.
4. Prepare and present financial reports, dashboards, and presentations to CEO and stakeholders.
5. Ensure timely and accurate reporting of financial results, including key performance indicators (KPIs).
C. Business Partnering
1. Collaborate with operational and functional leaders to provide financial guidance and support.
2. Act as a trusted advisor to business units, helping them understand financial implications and make informed decisions.
D. Transformation
1. Identify opportunities to streamline financial processes, improve data accuracy, and enhance efficiency.
2. Implement best practices in integrated business planning to enable end to end process
Qualifications
Education
1. Bachelor’s degree.
2. Top MBA, CPA, CFA, or other relevant certifications are a plus.
Experience
1. 8+ years of experience in strategy, planning, or a related field (varies by level: Analyst, Manager, Director).
2. Preferred candidate with top consulting firm experience and corporate strategy or planning experience.
Skills
1. Advanced Excel skills and strong proficiency in financial modeling.
2. Knowledge of data visualization tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI).
3. Experience with SQL or other data querying languages.
4. Excellent analytical and problem-solving abilities.
5. Strong communication and presentation skills, with the ability to convey complex financial information to non-financial stakeholders.
6. Detail-oriented with a focus on accuracy and timeliness.
7. Ability to work independently and manage multiple priorities in a fast-paced environment.
Key Competencies
1. Strategic thinking and business acumen.
2. Collaboration and teamwork.
3. Results-driven and proactive.
4. Strong organizational and time management skills.
company_box_content: Budweiser Brewing Company APAC Limited (“Bud APAC”) is the largest beer company in Asia Pacific, with leadership positions in Premium and Super Premium beer segments. It brews, imports, markets, distributes and sells a portfolio of more than 50 beer brands, including Budweiser®, Stella Artois®, Corona®, Harbin®, Hoegaarden® and Cass®. Through its local subsidiaries, Bud APAC operates in its principal markets, including China, South Korea, India and Vietnam. Headquartered in Hong Kong SAR, China, Bud APAC operates 47 breweries and employs more than 21,000 colleagues across APAC.

Bud APAC is listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange under the stock code “1876” and is a constituent stock of the Hang Seng Index. The company is a subsidiary of Anheuser-Busch InBev, the public company based in Leuven, Belgium and listed on Euronext which has over 600 years of brewing heritage and an extensive global presence.
百威亞太控股有限公司（百威亞太）是亞太地區最大的啤酒公司，在高端及超高端啤酒分部中佔據領導地位。公司釀製、進口、推廣、經銷及出售超過50個啤酒品牌組合，包括百威®、時代®、科羅娜®、哈爾濱®、福佳®及凱獅®。百威亞太通過其當地附屬公司，在主要市場開展業務，包括中國、韓國、印度及越南。百威亞太的總部設於中國香港特別行政區，於亞太地區營運47家釀酒廠，並僱用超過21,000名員工。
百威亞太於香港聯交所上市，股份代號為「1876」，屬恒生指數成份股。本公司為總部位於比利時魯汶的泛歐交易所上市公司Anheuser-Busch InBev的附屬公司，其擁有超過600年的釀酒歷史及龐大的全球業務。

head: Strategy Analyst
info: 中国 北京市 · 3 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Are you a data detective who loves turning numbers into narratives and insights into action? Do you get a thrill from uncovering the "why" behind business trends and using that knowledge to shape strategy?
We are looking for a sharp and driven
Product Analyst to empower our teams with data-driven intelligence working at our HQ in Dubai, UAE

. In this role, you will be the cornerstone of decision-making, providing the analytical firepower that guides our product roadmap and business strategy. You'll go beyond reporting—you'll be a strategic partner, using data to identify opportunities, mitigate risks, and tell the story of where we should go next.
If you have a consultant's problem-solving skills and a passion for the product lifecycle, this is your opportunity to make a tangible impact.
What You'll Do:
1. Analyze complex datasets, core metrics, and business drivers to generate actionable insights that answer our most pressing questions.
2. Develop and maintain intuitive dashboards, reports, and analytical frameworks that empower teams across the company to make smarter, faster decisions.
3. Partner directly with Product Managers and business leaders to identify growth opportunities, potential risks, and areas for optimization.
4. Provide research and analysis on market trends and leverage AI-driven analytical techniques to keep us at the forefront of innovation.
Who You Are (Qualifications):
1. You have experience in a highly analytical role (e.g., Business Analyst, Data Analyst, Strategy Analyst) within a consulting firm, tech company, or product-led organization.

2. You possess a strong quantitative background and are proficient in SQL, Python, R, or other data analysis tools. Experience with data visualization platforms (e.g., Tableau, Looker, Power BI) is essential.
3. You are a structured problem-solver who breaks down complex, ambiguous problems into actionable steps—consulting experience is a major plus.
4. You take ownership of your work from start to finish, demonstrating accountability for your insights and their impact.
5. You have an enterprise mindset: you're resilient, proactive, and have the drive to "find a way" to get to the answer.
Ideal Backgrounds Include:
1. Former analysts from top-tier consulting firms with exposure to tech, data, or AI projects.
2. Analysts from product-first organizations (e.g., tech-enabled consumer companies, SaaS businesses) who are skilled at partnering with product teams.
Why Join Us?
1. Strategic Influence: Your analysis will directly inform key product and business decisions, giving you a front-row seat to our strategy.
2. Skill Growth: Hone your technical skills while developing deep business acumen and strategic thinking in a high-impact environment.
3. Collaborative Culture: Join a team that values curiosity, intellectual rigor, and data-driven debate.
About Us-
Landmark Group

Our journey started in 1973 with a single store in Bahrain. Since then, we have grown into a global retail and hospitality group. The proud creator of 25 plus value led, own-built brands across retail, hospitality, food, and leisure.

Over the years, our UAE - based group has evolved into a comprehensive retail and hospitality entity, with over 2200 retail stores, leisure, and hospitality outlets, panning the GCC, Middle East, India, Southeast Asia, and Africa. Today, Landmark Group is one of GCC's largest omnichannel retailers and India's top home and fashion retailer.

We take immense pride in the organic growth of our retail brands, which have blossomed into household names. From Max, Splash, Babyshop, Centrepoint, Shoemart, Home Centre, Emax, Fitness First, to Fun City, to name a few, our brands span across a multitude of categories, enriching the lives of countless families over the past decade.
As a part of the Landmark Group, a renowned retail and hospitality conglomerate in the Middle East, North Africa, and India,
Landmark Digital is the dynamic digital arm of Landmark Retail,
serving as the cornerstone of our omnichannel business strategy.

Headquartered in Dubai, UAE, we oversee the digital operations of eight leading brands across diverse geographies, with ambitious plans for expansion into new territories and functions. Joining us means becoming a vital part of the Middle East's most significant bricks-to-clicks success story, boasting an impressive year-on-year growth rate exceeding 100%.

Comprising a talented workforce of over 700 professionals across diverse domains, Landmark Digital spearheads various functions including Enterprise and E-commerce Tech, Product Management, User Design, and MarTech, among others. With our futuristic outlook, we are committed to delivering seamless digital experiences to our customers.
Landmark Digital
At
Landmark Digital,
we cultivate an
agile work culture

, empowering you to make impactful decisions from day one within collaborative squads comprising professionals from over 20 nationalities. Additionally, our dedicated software development center in Bangalore, India, offers opportunities for incubation, design, and optimization of digital products.
Working at Landmark Digital means
engaging with cutting-edge technologies

, including Enterprise and E-commerce tech, headless commerce, Java Spring Boot, React Native, React frontend, and Azure Cloud solutions, providing an enriching environment for professional growth and development.
In addition to
competitive remuneration and benefits
, we prioritize
continuous learning and growth
through dedicated training and upskilling initiatives. Furthermore, our
vibrant workplace culture
fosters camaraderie through various team events, celebrations, and recreational amenities, ensuring a fulfilling experience both personally and professionally.
Come be a part of Landmark Digital, where innovation, collaboration, and growth converge to redefine the digital retail landscape

company_box_content: 小米公司正式成立于2010年4月，是一家专注于高端智能手机、互联网电视以及智能家居生态链建设的创新型科技企业。“让每个人都能享受科技的乐趣”是小米公司的愿景。小米公司应用了互联网开发模式开发产品的模式，用极客精神做产品，用互联网模式干掉中间环节，致力于让全球每个人，都能享用来自中国的优质科技产品。
2017年，小米跨越千亿营收的门槛，小米手机销量成功逆转，始终坚持技术创新，发布了澎湃S1处理器芯片，小米MIX 2继续引领全面屏技术
通过庞大而先进的智能硬件生态链布局和持续投入的云服务，建起了全球最大的IOT平台，并且在国内AI领域率先取得落地产品的成功
国际化迅猛发展，在进入的70多个国家和地区中16个国家销量进入了前5位，其中印度连续两个季度稳居市场份额第一。
2018年小米新征程开启之年，欢迎你的加入。

Jardine Restaurant Group (JRG)

, a member of the Jardine Matheson Group, is one of the leading food and beverage groups in Asia. Headquartered in Hong Kong, JRG employs more than 25,000 people who share the passion for food, bringing simple joys of food with delightful experience to customers. The Group operates over 1,000 outlets under the KFC, Pizza Hut and PHD brands in Hong Kong, Macao, Myanmar, Taiwan, and Vietnam.

We are guided by our three core values agility, customer-centricity, and empathy (ACE), they are the guiding principles that help us navigate through the rapidly changing and hyper competitive market environment: We cultivate an adaptive and resilient spirit, foster empowerment and innovation that creates growth
We strive to bring the joy of food and beverages for people to love, with the best possible customer experience
We endeavour to be people-centric, respect differences while we collaborate, and aim to bring a positive impact to our world, sustainably.
We are seeking a talented and driven
Commercial Analyst (Marketing Focus)
to join the
Pizza Hut

team. In this role, you will be responsible for conducting in-depth market research and analysis to support strategic decision-making and drive the continued growth and success of our restaurant operations
Job Responsibilities:
1. Analyze data and integrate market trends to provide actionable insights supporting business and marketing strategies.
2. Deliver data-driven recommendations for specialized projects, including CRM and partnership initiatives.
3. Conduct comprehensive market and competitor analysis to refine product positioning, pricing, and promotions.
4. Perform market research to identify business opportunities and support the business plan for sustainable growth
5. Collaborate effectively with internal teams to ensure seamless execution of marketing campaigns and initiatives.
6. Provide full administrative support to the Commercial & Business Partnership team to optimize operational efficiency
7. Participate in ad-hoc projects and assignments, showcasing adaptability and adept problem-solving skills
Requirements:

2. Minimum 1 year of experience in business analytics or CRM analytics within the F&B, Retail, or FMCG industry
3. Experience in PowerBI / Tableau is advantageous
4. Demonstrate numerical proficiency, coupled with strong business acumen and adept project management skills
5. Self-driven individual capable of working independently and thriving in a dynamic, fast-paced environment
6. Proficiency in written and spoken English, Cantonese, and Mandarin
7. Skilled in MS PowerPoint and Excel (e.g. vlookup and pivot tables)
8. Prior internship experience in marketing, data analysis, or related fields is a plus
What we need:

head: AI Product Manager
info: 中国 上海市 徐汇区 · 3 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Company Description

Garena is a leading global developer and publisher of online games, known for its popular titles such as Free Fire, which has been the most downloaded mobile battle royale game for six consecutive years. Garena also exclusively licenses and publishes hit titles like Arena of Valor and Call of Duty: Mobile in various global markets. The company is committed to creating social and entertainment experiences through games and is a prominent organizer of esports events. Garena is part of Sea Limited (NYSE:SE), a global consumer internet company whose other key businesses include Shopee and Monee.
Role Description
We are building a next-generation AI digital avatar product that helps users understand themselves and connect with kindred spirits. We’re looking for a Product Manager
(based in Shanghai)
who can drive the product from 0 → 1, combining psychology, AI, and gamified experiences.
1. Simplify, gamify, and personalize ways of collecting user personality input
2. Lead internal and external validation of personality modeling and AI features
3. Conduct user research and competitor analysis to define audience personas and core needs.
4. Capture user insights from AI interactions and translate them into product improvements.
5. Define and track key metrics (DAU/MAU, retention, engagement, completion rates).
6. Collaborate with psychologists, engineers, and designers to deliver milestones efficiently
Qualifications
1. 3+ years product management experience, ideally 0 → 1.
2. Experience in AI companion, social, content, educational or psychological app.
3. Overseas study or work experience preferred.
4. Strong independent thinking, creativity, and UX intuition.
5. Data-driven, familiar with A/B testing and analytics.
6. BONUS: Psychology knowledge (MBTI, Big Five)
company_box_content: Garena is a leading global online games developer and publisher. Free Fire, its self-developed mobile battle royale title, is the most downloaded mobile game in its genre for six consecutive years, according to Sensor Tower App Performance Insights. The title was also the world’s most downloaded mobile game in 2019, 2021, and again in 2023 and 2024.

Garena is run by passionate gamers and has a unique understanding of what gamers want. It exclusively licenses and publishes hit titles from global partners – such as Arena of Valor and Call of Duty: Mobile – in selected markets globally. Garena champions social and entertainment experiences through games, enabling its communities to engage and interact. Garena is also a leading esports organiser and hosts some of the world’s biggest esports events.

Garena is a part of Sea Limited (NYSE:SE), a leading global consumer internet company. In addition to Garena, Sea’s other core businesses include its e-commerce arm, Shopee, and digital financial services arm, Monee. Sea’s mission is to better the lives of consumers and small businesses with technology.

info: 中国 上海市 · 1 个月前 · 51 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
RESPONSIBILITIES:
1. Manage a team of 3 other analysts and plan their weekly output.

2. Conduct in-depth quantitative analyses to evaluate marketing effectiveness, develop sophisticated statistical models, and segment customer populations to enhance upselling, deepen customer engagement, and improve profitability through optimized customer channel behaviors.
3. Implement cutting-edge marketing analytics solutions, including predictive statistical modeling, digital user behavior segmentation, data mining, and external data enhancement.
4. Develop and test experimental designs, sampling techniques, and analytical methods to drive continuous improvement in internal tools and processes.
5. Perform ad hoc analyses of business scenarios, systems, and challenges to identify opportunities for growth and optimization.
6. Analyse online user behaviours and digital marketing performance across multiple channels to uncover new business opportunities and improve campaign effectiveness.
QUALIFICATION PROFILE
1. Bachelor's degree in quantitative discipline such as Statistics, Mathematics, Operations Research, Engineering, or a related field.
2. Minimum of 5 years of hands-on experience in marketing analytics, digital analytics, or CRM analytics within a fast-paced industry.
3. Proficiency in Power BI, SAS, R, SPSS, and SQL programming. Strong experience in statistical modeling is essential.
4. Exceptional problem-solving skills, strong business acumen, and the ability to communicate complex analytical insights effectively to stakeholders.
5. Proven ability to prioritize and resolve data-related issues with a high level of accuracy and attention to detail.

head: 经营分析/ 财务BP
info: 中国 北京市 · 3 个月前 · 25 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
工作内容：
1、预算预测与考核目标管理：根据事业部战略规划与业务需求，负责目标管理（目标制定及预估）、业务达成拆解分析（周报月报及专项分析报告），判断成本效率、利润、现金流等问题及寻找机会点、推动解决达成；
2、经营分析；对事业部内现有业务数据进行梳理汇总和跟踪监控，建立日常跟踪监控体系，及时敏锐地发现业务数据变化趋势；
3、决策支持：深入了解业务流程，透过数据分析持续挖掘业务增长点，提前发现业务问题，指导运营决策；与业务团队紧密协同，将策略方案通过高效落地。
4、负责输出业务经营过程中的洞察分析，寻找和发现经营目标达成的卡点和新机会；
任职资格：
1、本科及以上学历， 8年以上财务BP\经营分析的工作经验；
2、熟悉物流行业分析工作及相关流程，有内控和财务分析背景相关经验优先，对运输业务精通； 3、精通excel、大数据处理、有SQL经验者优先；
4、具备出色的分析、归纳、总结能力，优秀的表达和 分析报告撰写能力。
company_box_content: 京东于2004年正式涉足电商领域，2018年，京东集团市场交易额接近1.7万亿元*。2019年7月，京东集团第四次入榜《财富》全球500强，位列第139位，是中国线上线下最大的零售集团。

head: Data Analyst
info: 中国 浙江省 杭州 · 3 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Us

AliExpress is part of Alibaba International Digital Commerce Group. Launched in 2010, AliExpress is an international marketplace enabling global consumers to buy directly from manufacturers and distributors in China and around the world. It is available in 18 languages, including English, Portuguese, Spanish and French.
Why Join Us

AliExpress elevates shopping with quality products and superior service, streamlining global commerce for SMEs. Imagine a career where your growth is limitless, collaborating on transformative projects with global impact.

AliExpress boasts a global team that spans various countries including China, Spain, the United States, Korea, Saudi Arabia, Brazil, among others. Wherever you are, you'll find AliExpress's spirit of innovation and collaboration.
What We Look For

At AliExpress, we seek passionate, dedicated individuals who thrive in collaborative and innovative environments. Ideal candidates are enthusiastic team players committed to learning and contributing. We value both strategic thinking and proactive execution. Join us, and let's explore limitless possibilities together.
Job Descriptions
- Design and implement advanced data models and algorithms to extract insights from large and complex datasets, focusing on business growth and optimization in the Korea market.
- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to understand business needs, define key performance indicators (KPIs), and develop data-driven solutions to address strategic challenges.
- Analyze and interpret data to identify trends, patterns, and correlations, providing actionable recommendations for product development, marketing strategies, and operational improvements.
- Present findings and recommendations in a clear and actionable manner and support major business decisions
Qualifications:
- 3+ year experience as a data scientist
- Bachelor's degree in Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a related field with a strong emphasis on data analysis
- Proficiency at SQL, as well as experience with data visualization tools such as Tableau or Power BI
- Experience in consumer/retail/internet companies or international strategy/operations firm is a big plus
- Fluent in Korean and Chinese, with the ability to work in a multicultural environment
- Strong logical and critical thinking skills to highlight complex problems
intellectual curiosity with excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
- Dynamic personality with quick reaction to changing environments and ability to work under pressure.
- Ability to communicate in easy words to non-technical stakeholders
Note: This position is based in Hangzhou, China

AliExpress is an equal-opportunity employer. We firmly believe in and practice non-discrimination and inclusion. We welcome and respect individuals from different backgrounds, cultures, communities, and perspectives. Our diverse workforce is a testament to our commitment to equality, ensuring that everyone has an equal opportunity to succeed and contribute.

head: myBUY Controls, Compliance & Governance Assistant Manager; 采购控制与合规助理经理
info: 中国 四川省 成都市 · 重新发布时间: 3 天前 · 22 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Overview

This role will play a pivotal role within the Control & Governance team of the procurement team and has a main objective to contribute to risk mitigation, policy implementation, and the overall effectiveness of our procurement governance framework for APAC Sector.
Responsibilities
Compliance & Policy Adherence

Monitor procurement activities to ensure strict compliance with internal policies, procedures, and relevant regulatory requirements. Conduct regular reviews of purchase orders to identify any deviations/non-compliant activities from the policy.

Continuously monitor changes in relevant global policies and regulations and perform impact analysis on the existing controls and implement the required changes to the controls upon alignment from controls team.
Ensure the myBuy Policies and guidelines are in line with P2P and Global Procurement policy and guidelines.
Collaborate with key stakeholders from control and procurement teams to develop, update, and communicate procurement controls matrix.
Prepare training materials to employees within the department to enhance awareness of compliance obligations.
Ensure that the GCS scope controls are executed as per the controls design matrix and ensure the same has been documented in the GCS portal on timely manner.

Act as a liaison between the procurement department and internal auditors. Collaborate during audits, providing necessary documentation, explanations, and implementing corrective actions in a timely manner.
Risk Assessment and Mitigation

Develop and implement risk mitigation strategies, working closely with procurement stakeholders and continuously monitor the effectiveness of these strategies and make adjustments as needed. (e.g.: Governance calls).
Support and review myBUY CR initiatives/system upgrade with subject matter experts (SMEs) in APAC.
Process Standardization
Closely work with myBUY myBUY control, compliance and governance GPO to drive standardization across all sectors.
Qualifications
Bachelor degree in Finance/Supply Chain/Management/Accounting/Business Administration. A master degree is a plus.
5+ Years of experience required.
Functional knowledge: Depth of different aspects of Procurement such as processes and tools, knowledge in Food & Beverage industry a plus.
Experience in sourcing processes and technologies, with experience of implementing them in a global and regional environment.
Advanced proficiency in data analysis tools, including Microsoft Excel (e.g., advanced formulas, pivot tables, data validation)
data visualization tools skills like Tableau or Power BI is a plus.
Strong communication & negotiation skills .
Results Oriented - comfortable setting and delivering against bold, stretch targets.
English essential, both verbal and in writing.
Comfortable working within matrix organization .
Affinity with technology applications and business processes and the impact on people.
Strong analytical, problem solving, and root cause identification skills.
Solid understanding of the PepsiCo organization and cultural differences.

head: Performance and Reward Consultant
info: 中国 广东省 · 2 个月前 · 35 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Some careers shine brighter than others.

If you’re looking for a career that will help you stand out, join HSBC and fulfil your potential. Whether you want a career that could take you to the top, or simply take you in an exciting new direction, HSBC offers opportunities, support and rewards that will take you further.
HSBC is one of the largest banking and financial services organisations in the world, with operations in 62
countries and territories. We aim to be where the growth is, enabling businesses to thrive and economies to prosper, and, ultimately, helping people to fulfil their hopes and realise their ambitions.
We are currently seeking an experienced professional to join our team in the role of Performance and Reward Consultant.
In this role, you will:
1.  Provide P&R advice and support in support of the delivery of the HSBC China entities Strategic Business Objective/Country Strategic Plan.
2. Project manage P&R initiatives to support HSBC China entities priorities

3. Lead the implementation of P&R initiatives supporting HSBC China entities. Examples include the creation of global objectives, managing recognition programmes, undertaking Job evaluation and reviews of Material Risk Takers

4. Lead coordination of the annual pay review for HSBC China entities, which would typically involve supporting the variable pay pool allocation (e.g. Guideline Variable Pay modelling, determining the Junior Resource Pool grid), providing support materials for business engagement, supporting performance calibration, country Incentivizing Compliance reviews and providing quality assurance of pay review outcomes. Guidance should balance group P&R requirements with HSBC China entities requirements
5. Assess the effectiveness of policies and processes and pro-actively recommend new and innovative approaches and solutions

6. Lead on market benchmarking activities across the HSBC China entities and provide expertise to review and interpret the results and to summarize key market trends for stakeholders in P&R, HR and the business
7. Produce documentation to support the understanding, interpretation or implementation of P&R activities within the business, including specialist activities as necessary

8. Provide expert guidance on requests for information on P&R policies, processes and procedures. This may include responses to audit findings or input into broader business initiatives which overlap with P&R areas of responsibility
9. Provide oversight of reward analytics outputs to ensure consistent, quality and relevant deliverables are provided to senior audiences
10. Maintain specialist knowledge by keeping abreast of published materials, competitor practice, external market developments and trends and legislative and regulatory developments
To be successful in this role, you should meet the following requirements:
1. Stakeholder management and influencing skills with the ability to engage a diverse stakeholder group, including senior populations
2. Strong knowledge of financial services performance and reward practices in global organizations
3. Strong business acumen with an ability to link business strategy to people practices; ability to apply critical analysis and judgment when reviewing activities
4. Ability to work in a matrix environment and influence counterparts in global, regional and country teams
5. Proven track record of successful implementation of performance and reward initiatives
6. Knowledge of local legal and regulatory environment
7. Ability and willingness to contribute to the broader team and work as an effective team member
Candidate with less relevant experience or skills may be offered a lower Global Career Band than stated above.
Due to the urgent hiring need, candidates with immediate right to work locally and no relocation need will be prioritised.
You’ll achieve more when you join HSBC.

We take pride in providing a workplace that fosters continuous professional development, flexible working and opportunities to grow within an inclusive and diverse environment. info: 中国 上海市 · 3 个月前 · 85 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
JD

1. Responsible for the preparation and review of monthly/quarterly/annual consolidated financial statements and notes for the company's Europe-Africa sector, ensuring compliance with IFRS and group policies.
2. Responsible for the preparation and maintenance of consolidation working papers (trial balance mapping, elimination entries, intercompany reconciliations), ensuring traceability and accuracy.
3. Conduct quality control and verification of financial data submitted by Europe-Africa subsidiaries, promptly identifying and resolving data anomalies and reporting discrepancies.
4. Assist in the initial accounting treatment and consolidation of newly established subsidiaries/projects within the Europe-Africa region.
5. Provide financial analysis support required by management (expense structure, profit contribution, intercompany transactions, etc.).
6. Liaise with internal and external auditors.
7. Continuously optimize existing consolidation processes, improve Excel templates, internal checklists, and process documentation, and support the implementation of consolidation systems.
Profile
1. Bachelor’s degree or higher in Finance, Accounting, Auditing, or a related field.

2. Experience in one of the Big Four accounting firms (Audit/FAAS/consolidation reporting support) or in group consolidation/reporting at a multinational corporation. In-house reporting experience is a plus.
3. Practical experience with ERP/SAP/Oracle is preferred. Experience in independently completing consolidation and accounting work in environments with underdeveloped systems is a plus.
4. Strong communication skills in both Chinese and English, with the ability to collaborate with headquarters and regional subsidiary finance personnel.
5. Willingness to accept short-to-medium-term business trips to Europe.
company_box_content: 国轩高科股份有限公司创立于2006年，总部位于安徽合肥，是具有全球竞争力的新能源电池企业和绿色能源解决方案商。于2015年5月成功上市，股票代码SZ:002074.。
公司主营磷酸铁锂材料及电芯、三元材料及电芯、动力电池组、储能电池组及电池管理系统等，产品广泛应用于乘用车、商用车、专用车等新能源汽车领域，并为储能客户提供绿色能源系统解决方案。
国轩高科是重技术型公司。研发投入占比多年超10%，在全球布局八大研发中心、四大验证平台，研发人员突破7000人，创造了10000多项覆盖电池全产业链的全球专利技术，国轩高科标准电芯获大众汽车全球首家定点，“金石电池”进军固态电池领域，实现从0到1的创新。
国轩高科是高国际化电池企业。德国大众是国轩高科第一大股东，布局中国、亚太、美洲、欧非四大业务板块，建有覆盖电池材料、电芯制造、Pack产品的全球二十个制造基地，致力于让绿色能源服务人类。
国轩高科是全产业链电池企业。构建从电池原料的矿产开采、材料生产、电池制造、产品应用，再到电池回收利用的垂直一体化产业链，是全球极少数拥有全产业链制造能力的电池企业之一。
公司秉承“让绿色能源服务人类”的使命，坚持产品为王、人才为本、用户至上，积极构建以材料科学和数字科学为基础的能源科学体系。未来，公司将加速提升市场力、产品力、制造力和资本力，发展成为全球领先的绿色能源解决方案商。

head: Demand Analyst
info: 中国 江苏省 苏州市 · 3 个月前 · 9 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About WhiteCrow

We are global talent research, insight and pipelining specialists with offices in the UK, USA, Singapore, Malaysia, Hong Kong, Dubai, and India. Our international reach has helped us to understand and penetrate specialist markets at a global level. In addition to this, our service is also extended to complement our client’s in-house research.
About our client

For more than 80 years, our client’s engineers and product specialists have partnered with customers to produce highly engineered connectivity and sensing solutions that make a connected world possible. Their focus on reliability, durability, and sustainability exemplifies their commitment to progress. The unmatched range of their product portfolio enables companies, large and small, to turn ideas into technology that can transform how the world works and lives tomorrow.
As a Demand Analyst, you will be responsible for...
Responsibilities:
1. Facilitating the global Sales and Operating Planning (S&OP) process by conducting a reliable and efficient monthly demand review for the designated territory and product lines.
2. Collaborating with the sales team and product management to create an accurate and comprehensive consensus forecast, which includes organizing formal monthly demand review meetings.
3. Partnering with the sales organization, global product management team, and Finance team in the quarterly commit sales forecasting process and annual sales budgeting process.
4. Delivering monthly product mix forecasts to the operations and supply chain teams, highlighting potential opportunities for growth as well as any associated risks

5. Tracking the demand plan against actual results on a monthly basis, assessing forecast accuracy and providing detailed insights to operations. Hold key contributors - such as product management, sales, and operations - accountable for their performance.
6. Driving continuous improvement on processes and methodologies for collecting information and predicting demand.
7. Consistent attendance, understanding of, and compliance with company policies, rules, and regulations.
What you already have...

1. Bachelor’s degree, or its equivalent, in a related field, such as finance, marketing, business administration, supply chain, operations management, or industrial engineering required. APICS or other certification is preferred.
2. Excellent analytical and advanced computer skills (such as Excel), with the ability to mine data and derive critical and salient information from diverse inputs.
3. Experience with analytical systems and tools (IBP/SAP/Data Warehouse, etc.) preferred.
4. Quick learner, capable of adapting to new systems and developing and continuously improving processes.

5. Excellent communication skills (clear, concise oral and written presentations), interpersonal skills, effective negotiation and influencing skills, capable of being unbiased and fair in achieving compromise solutions and consensus positions.
6. 3-5 years experience in S&OP, demand planning, supply chain, material planning, or capacity planning.
7. Fluent in Putonghua and English.
8. Project management and problem-solving skills.
9. Ability to work independently in an international environment and willing to travel periodically (short periods) including abroad if needed.

head: Strategic Transportation Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 · 2 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
PRINCIPAL DUTIES:
1. Assist to foster professional relationships with government, local and international research institutions and industrial partners.
2. Track the forthcoming policies/regulations/standards; assist to analyze their impacts on fuel and petroleum demand.
3. Participate in various transportation strategic studies aimed at understanding the interplay between future engine and fuel technologies and global energy demand / supply landscape.
4. Participate in applied research studies related to fuel requirements of advanced and future transportation engines.
5. Assist to prepare materials for patents, make presentations, and publish technical papers or articles in peer-reviewed journals and other public media.
6. Perform other miscellaneous duties as directed by Line Manager.
MINIMUM REQUIREMENTS:
1. Bachelor degree in fuel or other related science with 3 years of relevant research experience. Alternatively, fresh Master graduate in fuel related major.
2. Experience in building consensus with governmental, regulatory, and standards organizations is a plus.
3. Knowledge of the impact of fuels on transportation engine performance and emissions.
4. Knowledge of engine technology development trends.
5. Knowledge of fuel formulation, fuel characterization methods, fuel blending techniques, refining, and chemical processes.

head: Analyst, Collections, Regional
info: 中国 上海市 浦东新区 · 重新发布时间: 12 小时前 · 32 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Your Job
MOLEX is seeking a detail-oriented and contribution minded
Accounts Receivable Analyst

to join our global Collections Team. This position will engage, challenge, and provide fulfilment to a candidate with initiative and a sense of urgency. If you enjoy teamwork, embrace challenges, and seek mutually beneficial opportunities to drive our business forward, we want to hear from you!
What You Will Do
Ensure that customers adhere to established payment terms by monitoring and tracking payment schedules for timely processing.
Proactively manage and take ownership of your portfolio of customers, collaborating with internal stakeholders in resolving payment issues.
Timely report and escalate when material issues or impacts.
Be a teammate. We are a global team of likeminded contribution driven Collectors.
Lead or coordinate negotiations related to payments and claims with cross-functions.
Coordinate with Invoice team to ensure issue VAT per customer requirements.
Continuously seek opportunities through innovation for process improvement and system optimization.
Who You Are (Basic Qualifications)
Strong communication skills (both written and verbal) necessary for professional interactions with both external and internal contacts.
Ability to proactively engage in a rapidly changing business environment while demonstrating a high level of transparency, accountability, and collaboration.
Detail oriented problem solver, quick learner with ability to multi-task.
Good English communication skill is a must.
What Will Put You Ahead
1+ years as a collection specialist in an international environment.
Possess hands on knowledge of MS office, SAP System and Getpaid tool.
Experience with Power BI or other data visualization software/tools.
Process Transformation / Process Automation / Process Implementation experience.

At Koch companies, we are entrepreneurs. This means we openly challenge the status quo, find new ways to create value and get rewarded for our individual contributions. The thousands of innovators who work for Molex have made us a global electronics leader. Our experienced people, groundbreaking products and leading-edge technologies help us deliver a wider array of solutions to more markets than ever before.

business philosophy

5. Lead or coordinate negotiations related to payments and claims with cross-functions.
6. Coordinate with Invoice team to ensure issue VAT per customer requirements.
7. Continuously seek opportunities through innovation for process improvement and system optimization.
