head: Product Manager – Service Tools
info: 中国 北京市 · 2 个月前 · 27 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
【About JD.com】

JD.com (NASDAQ: JD and HKEX: 9618), also known as JINGDONG, has evolved from a pioneering e-commerce platform into a leading technology and service provider with supply chain at its core. Renowned for its supply chain innovation and excellence, JD.com has expanded into sectors including retail, technology, logistics, healthcare, and more, aiming to transform traditional business models with cutting-edge digital solutions. Ranked 47th on the Fortune Global 500, JD.com is China’s largest retailer by revenue.
【Our International Business】

We are dedicated to building a digitally intelligent, cross-border supply chain and global retail infrastructure. Leveraging our global supply chain capabilities, JD.com continues to expand in markets where our competitive strengths shine. Currently, JD.com operates globally, with business activities in countries such as China, the U.S., U.K., Netherlands, France, Germany, Spain, Brazil, Hungary, Japan, South Korea, Australia, Thailand, Vietnam, Malaysia, Indonesia, Saudi Arabia, the UAE, and many others, reaching customers in every corner of the world.
Learn more about us: https://corporate.jd.com/
服务工具产品经理（全链路及智能客服方向）
地点：北京
职责描述：
1. 作为业务方产品接口人，对接各模块产研团队，推动自研工作台从0到1落地；
2. 重构客服操作界面，优化工单处理、知识库调用及跨系统跳转等功能体验；
3. 开发实时辅助模块（如话术推荐、规则提示），提升全流程处理效率；
4. 打通“咨询-质检-复盘”闭环，消除系统断点，提升自动转工单率；
5. 建立数据监控机制，跟踪智能工具效能，驱动资源调配与优化；
6. 分析用户行为，制定智能策略产品实现路径并推动落地；
7. 负责智能客服系统规划，设计多语言意图识别、自动判责、知识库推荐等核心功能；
8. 构建智能路由体系，根据用户属性、问题类型、语言偏好及历史服务数据动态分配人工客服。
任职要求：
1. 5年以上跨境业务客服全链路工具产品设计经验，需主导过CRM、工单系统、质检平台中至少两类系统设计，具备智能客服系统产品经验；
2. 精通客服工作流痛点诊断，能够提供用户旅程地图样例，熟悉B端工具设计规范；
3. 熟练掌握SQL、Excel、Tableau等数据分析工具，具备优秀的数据敏感度和结构化思维能力；
4. 深入理解跨境客服流程（如多语言支持、时区排班等挑战），英语听说读写流利。
Product Manager – Service Tools (Full-Process & Intelligent Customer Service)
Location:
Beijing
Responsibilities:
1. Act as the business-side product liaison, collaborating with R&D teams across modules to drive the implementation of the in-house customer service workstation from concept (0) to launch (1).
2. Redesign the customer service interface to optimize experiences in ticket handling, knowledge base utilization, and cross-system navigation.
3. Develop real-time assistance modules (e.g., script recommendations, rule prompts) to improve end-to-end processing efficiency.
4. Integrate the “Consultation–Quality Check–Review” closed loop, eliminating system breakpoints and increasing the rate of automated ticket generation.

5. Establish data monitoring mechanisms to track the effectiveness of intelligent tools, guiding resource allocation and optimization; analyze user behavior to design and implement intelligent strategy roadmaps.

6. Lead the planning of intelligent customer service systems, designing core features such as multilingual intent recognition, automated responsibility attribution, and knowledge base recommendations.
7. Build an intelligent routing framework that dynamically allocates agents based on user attributes, issue type, language preferences, and historical service data.
Requirements:

1. Minimum 5 years of experience in designing full-process customer service tools for cross-border business, with proven leadership in at least two system designs (e.g., CRM, ticketing systems, quality inspection platforms), plus hands-on experience in intelligent customer service products.
2. Strong expertise in diagnosing pain points in customer service workflows, with the ability to provide sample customer journey maps; familiarity with B-end (enterprise) tool design standards.
3. Proficient in SQL, Excel, Tableau, and other data analysis tools; excellent data sensitivity and structured thinking skills.
4. Deep understanding of cross-border customer service processes (e.g., multilingual support, time zone scheduling challenges); fluent in English (listening, speaking, reading, and writing).
What We Offer:
1. The exciting opportunity to shape category strategies and contribute to the growth of a new and dynamic e-commerce business.
2. A diverse, inclusive work environment, where you can make a significant impact on JD.com's regional presence.
3. A competitive salary and benefits package, including health insurance, pension, and performance bonuses.

JD.com is committed to creating a diverse environment and is proud to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, gender, gender identity or expression, sexual orientation, national origin, genetics, disability, age, or veteran status.
company_box_content: 京东于2004年正式涉足电商领域，2018年，京东集团市场交易额接近1.7万亿元*。2019年7月，京东集团第四次入榜《财富》全球500强，位列第139位，是中国线上线下最大的零售集团。
2014年5月，京东集团在美国纳斯达克证券交易所正式挂牌上市，是中国第一个成功赴美上市的大型综合型电商平台。2015年7月，京东凭借高成长性入选纳斯达克100指数和纳斯达克100平均加权指数。
2019年前三个季度，京东集团净收入达4062亿元，非美国通用会计准则下（Non-GAAP）归属于普通股股东的净利润近100亿元，创历史最高纪录；研发投入超过130亿元，跃升为中国企业中对技术投入最多的公司之一。
京东集团定位于“以供应链为基础的技术与服务企业”，目前业务已涉及零售、数字科技、物流、技术服务、健康、保险、物流地产、云计算、AI和海外等领域，其中核心业务为零售、数字科技、物流、技术服务四大板块。
京东集团奉行客户为先 、诚信、 协作、 感恩 、拼搏 、担当的价值观，目标是成为全球最值得信赖的企业。

job_details_content: ##              职位简介
What You'll Do:

We are seeking a highly motivated Data Analyst to join our team and support key businesses across APAC, including the growth of key China clients. In this role, you will leverage your technical skills and proactive mindset to transform data analytics into actionable insights.

Your role includes expanding optimization and development for key agency related clients and accounts, accelerating growth for strategic China clients, and driving efficiency of support by collaborating with different teams and utilizing tools and resources. You will utilize your technical expertise, a client-focused approach, strategic consulting skills, and a deep understanding of market dynamics to deliver impactful solutions.

Working closely with various teams, you will deliver automation tools and solution to optimize campaigns, address key challenges, and achieve measurable results. Your work will directly contribute to client/agency success and business growth, particularly by unlocking new opportunities for China clients through analytics and tailored solutions.
As part of a collaborative and dynamic team, you will play a key role in driving efficiency and delivering impactful solutions that meet client and agency needs and contribute to business growth.

Analyze and Identify Opportunities: Understand business needs and challenges by analyzing features and market needs. Develop innovative and effective ideas that address these challenges and deliver value.
Support various China Client Growth: Partner with China teams to deliver insights and scalable solutions that drive measurable growth, optimize performance, and deepen strategic partnerships.

Scale Impact and Recommend Solutions: Translate ideas into actionable recommendations, supporting teams with optimization strategies and development of a tool. Scale proven solutions across clients and markets to maximize business value and deliver impactful outcomes.
Who You Are:

You possess a unique blend of technical expertise, analytical acumen, and a client-focused mindset. You thrive in collaborative environments, are detail-oriented, and demonstrate strong leadership and communication skills.
Technical Skills:
A solid grasp of SQL and Python to manage complex data scenarios and create meaningful tools
Hands-on experience with data techniques, such as automation, deep-dive analysis, and report
Familiarity with methods to create automation and assess business impacts with tools
Analytical Skills:
Ability to identify patterns and understand data relationships, turning them into actionable features and tools that drive impact
Ability to translate complex analytics into clear, strategic recommendations
Strong skills in creating clear and compelling visualizations to communicate insights to diverse stakeholders
Client-Centric Mindset:
Deep understanding of client challenges
designing tailored optimization strategies that meet business unique needs
Ability to communicate data-driven insights in a clear and actionable way, ensuring alignment with market objectives
A business-oriented mindset to anticipate potential challenges and adapt strategies accordingly would set you apart
Communication Skills:
Proficiency in English and Chinese is mandatory for working with both local and global teams
Ability to simplify complex technical concepts into clear, concise language that resonates with clients and commercial stakeholders
Leadership & Proactivity:
Ability to lead initiatives, facilitate cross-functional collaboration and alignment of efforts across teams
Experience managing projects with defined objectives, timelines and deliverables
Taking ownership of challenges and identifying opportunities for innovation
Market Understanding:
Ability to adapt solutions to client contexts industry-specific challenges, and market dynamics, ensuring relevance and impact in every situation
Desired Background:

Bachelor’s degree or higher (Master’s degree or above preferred) in Statistics, Data Science, Applied Mathematics, Operations Research, Industrial Engineering, Computer Science, Data Analytics, or a related quantitative field
3+ years of relevant experience in analytics, consulting, or digital advertising
Familiarity with Adtech technologies (e.g., cookies, DSP, SSP, RTB) and experience in Agency landscape would be beneficial

We acknowledge that many candidates may not meet every single role requirement listed above. If your experience looks a little different from our requirements but you believe that you can still bring value to the role, we’d love to see your application!
Who We Are:

Criteo is a leader in commerce media, helping brands, agencies, and publishers create meaningful consumer connections through AI-powered advertising solutions. We’re shaping a more open and sustainable digital future for advertising.

At Criteo, our culture is as unique as it is diverse. From our offices across the globe or from the comfort of home, our 3,600 Criteos collaborate together to build an open, impactful, and forward-thinking environment.

We foster a workplace where everyone is valued, and employment decisions are based solely on skills, qualifications, and business needs—never on non-job-related factors or legally protected characteristics.
What We Offer:
🏢 Ways of working – Our hybrid model blends home with in-office experiences, making space for both.
📈 Grow with us – Learning, mentorship & career development programs.
💪 Your wellbeing matters – Health benefits, wellness perks & mental health support.
🤝 A team that cares – Diverse, inclusive, and globally connected.
💸 Fair pay & perks – Attractive salary, with performance-based rewards and family-friendly policies, plus the potential for equity depending on role and level.
Additional benefits may vary depending on the country where you work and the nature of your employment with Criteo.

1. Analyze and Identify Opportunities: Understand business needs and challenges by analyzing features and market needs. Develop innovative and effective ideas that address these challenges and deliver value.

3. Scale Impact and Recommend Solutions: Translate ideas into actionable recommendations, supporting teams with optimization strategies and development of a tool. Scale proven solutions across clients and markets to maximize business value and deliver impactful outcomes.

Its industry leading Commerce Media Platform connects thousands of marketers and media owners to deliver richer consumer experiences from product discovery to purchase. By powering trusted and impactful advertising, Criteo supports an open internet that encourages discovery, innovation, and choice. For more information, please visit www.criteo.com.

head: Assistant/Associate Analyst, Location Planning
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 1 天前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Company Description
Job Description
This job is located at our APAC Home Office in Shanghai, China.
The Location Planning Analyst is a central corporate service role enabling the company to achieve strategic objectives and financial goals through global inventory strategies.

This role is the Center of Excellence for location planning, spearheading the development of strategic inventory processes, ensuring seamless coordination across regions and maintaining a global view of key inventory benchmarks.

The Location Planning Analyst will be working closely with the Supply Chain, Planning, Store Operations and Finance Teams to provide end to end strategic inventory alignment. This role requires a strategic mindset combined with a keen attention to detail and data accuracy. The ideal candidate will be a collaborative team player with a passion for problem-solving and thrives in a fast-paced environment.
What Will You Be Doing?
Develop and implement a comprehensive global inventory strategy aligned with the company's overall business objectives.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align inventory goals with sales forecasts, delivery schedules, and omni-channel market demands.
Drive accurate placement of inventory by region, DC, and store while maintaining company level KPIs
Support the Stores and Store Operation teams through capacity modeling, offsite analysis, and strategy execution needs.
Lead efforts to optimize inventory levels to meet customer demand while minimizing carrying costs and stockouts.
Own the location level inventory plan in partnership with merchandise planning to ensure financial and service metrics are met.
Work collectively with supply chain, visual merchandising, and testing to ensure inventory readiness for all promotions and events.
Develop and implement inventory management strategies that accommodate end of life inventory management across all selling channels.
Develop and implement assortment segmentation strategies based on product characteristics, demand patterns, and sales forecasts.
Identify and implement process improvements to enhance the efficiency of inventory management processes globally.
Proactively identify potential risks to inventory management and develop mitigation strategies.
Monitor inventory health across all locations and nodes and address aged or inefficient inventory.
Travel to stores in the region and collaborate with local store teams on executing global/regional strategies.
Assess productivity of inventory and ability to hit sell through targets.
What Do You Need To Bring?
Bachelor’s Degree in economics, finance, data analytics, data visualization or related field, or equivalent experience preferred
2-4 years experience in inventory planning / allocation / location planning within fashion industry
Excellent math, organization, and time management skills
Proficient in MS Office and Excel, Power BI
Strong ability to handle and understand analytical data, with keen attention to detail and accuracy
Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with a collaborative approach to working with cross-functional teams
Thrives in a fast-paced environment with a focus on continuous improvement and process implementation
Eagerness to creatively solve problems and drive business profitability and growth
Our Company

Abercrombie & Fitch Co. (A&F Co.) is a global retailer of five iconic, omnichannel lifestyle brands catering to the kid through millennial customer: Abercrombie & Fitch, abercrombie kids, Hollister, Gilly Hicks and Social Tourist. At A&F Co., we’re here for our associates, customers and communities on the journey to being and becoming who they are – and because no journey is the same, we strive to create an inclusive culture, where everyone is free to share ideas.
Our Values

We lead with purpose and always put our people first, which is evidenced by our Great Place to Work™ Certification, as well as being a 2021 recipient of Fortune’s Best Workplaces in Retail, and named a Best Place to Work for LGBTQ+ Equality by the Human Rights Campaign for 16 consecutive years. We’re proud to offer equitable compensation and benefits, including flexibility and competitive Paid Time Off, as well as education and engagement events, including various Associate Resource Groups, volunteer opportunities and additional time off to give back to our global communities.
What You'll Get

As an Abercrombie & Fitch Co. (A&F Co.) associate, you’ll be eligible to participate in a variety of benefit programs designed to fit you and your lifestyle. A&F is committed to providing simple, competitive, and comprehensive benefits that align with our Company’s culture and values, but most importantly – with you! We also provide competitive incentives to reward the commitment our associates have for moving our global business forward:
Incentive bonus program
Annual companywide review process
Flexible spending accounts
Medical, dental, and vision insurance
Life and disability insurance
Associate assistance program
Paid parental and adoption leave
Access to fertility and adoption benefits through Carrot
Access to mental health and wellness app, Headspace
Paid Caregiver Leave
Mobile Stipend
Paid time off & one paid volunteer day per year, allowing you to give back to your community
Work from anywhere (Mondays and Fridays are “work from anywhere” days for most roles & six work from anywhere weeks per year)
Seven associate wellness half days per year
Merchandise discount on all of our brands
Opportunities for career advancement, we believe in promoting from within
Access to multiple Associate Resource Groups
Global team of people who will celebrate you for being YOU!
Additional Information
ABERCROMBIE & FITCH CO. IS AN EQUAL OPPORTUNITY EMPLOYER
1. Develop and implement a comprehensive global inventory strategy aligned with the company's overall business objectives.
2. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to align inventory goals with sales forecasts, delivery schedules, and omni-channel market demands.
3. Drive accurate placement of inventory by region, DC, and store while maintaining company level KPIs
4. Support the Stores and Store Operation teams through capacity modeling, offsite analysis, and strategy execution needs.
5. Lead efforts to optimize inventory levels to meet customer demand while minimizing carrying costs and stockouts.
6. Own the location level inventory plan in partnership with merchandise planning to ensure financial and service metrics are met.
7. Work collectively with supply chain, visual merchandising, and testing to ensure inventory readiness for all promotions and events.
8. Develop and implement inventory management strategies that accommodate end of life inventory management across all selling channels.
9. Develop and implement assortment segmentation strategies based on product characteristics, demand patterns, and sales forecasts.
10. Identify and implement process improvements to enhance the efficiency of inventory management processes globally.
11. Proactively identify potential risks to inventory management and develop mitigation strategies.
12. Monitor inventory health across all locations and nodes and address aged or inefficient inventory.
13. Travel to stores in the region and collaborate with local store teams on executing global/regional strategies.
14. Assess productivity of inventory and ability to hit sell through targets.
1. Bachelor’s Degree in economics, finance, data analytics, data visualization or related field, or equivalent experience preferred
2. 2-4 years experience in inventory planning / allocation / location planning within fashion industry
3. Excellent math, organization, and time management skills
4. Proficient in MS Office and Excel, Power BI
5. Strong ability to handle and understand analytical data, with keen attention to detail and accuracy
6. Excellent verbal and written communication skills, with a collaborative approach to working with cross-functional teams
7. Thrives in a fast-paced environment with a focus on continuous improvement and process implementation
8. Eagerness to creatively solve problems and drive business profitability and growth
1. Incentive bonus program
2. Annual companywide review process
3. Flexible spending accounts
4. Medical, dental, and vision insurance
5. Life and disability insurance
6. Associate assistance program
7. Paid parental and adoption leave
8. Access to fertility and adoption benefits through Carrot
9. Access to mental health and wellness app, Headspace
10. Paid Caregiver Leave
11. Mobile Stipend
12. Paid time off & one paid volunteer day per year, allowing you to give back to your community
13. Work from anywhere (Mondays and Fridays are “work from anywhere” days for most roles & six work from anywhere weeks per year)
14. Seven associate wellness half days per year
15. Merchandise discount on all of our brands
16. Opportunities for career advancement, we believe in promoting from within
17. Access to multiple Associate Resource Groups
18. Global team of people who will celebrate you for being YOU!
company_box_content: Abercrombie & Fitch Co. (NYSE: ANF) is a global, digitally led omnichannel specialty retailer of apparel and accessories catering to kids through millennials with assortments curated for their specific lifestyle needs.

The company operates a family of brands, including Abercrombie brands and Hollister brands, each sharing a commitment to offer products of enduring quality and exceptional comfort that support global customers on their journey to being and becoming who they are. Abercrombie & Fitch Co. operates approximately 790 stores under these brands across North America, Europe, Asia and the Middle East, as well as the e-commerce sites abercrombie.com, abercrombiekids.com, and hollisterco.com.
Working at A&F Co.

We strive to create welcoming, omni-channel experiences for our global customers. Every day, our associates show up and empower one another to stay curious and push boundaries. Whether you lead yourself, a team, or the company, everyone has a voice at A&F Co. Get a glimpse into where we work Instagram @LifeatANF.

To apply for jobs and learn more about our hiring process, visit corporate.abercrombie.com/careers/ If you are emailed by an A&F Co. recruiter at any point in the hiring process, it will come from an email address ending in @anfcorp.com, @stores.anfcorp.com or @smartrecruiters.com.

head: Analyst / Associate - Rewards, Data & Intelligence, Beijing / Shanghai/ South China
info: 中国 广东省 · 1 个月前 · 67 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
The Business

WTW Data Services is a global centre of excellence for compensation, benefits and employment practices information. Our databases cover almost 100 countries, ensuring we can support companies wherever they do business. Our rigorous data processes, coupled with the depth of our databases, guarantee the delivery of high-quality, robust data and consistent reporting practices.

In addition to compensation surveys, we publish reference materials that help HR practitioners attract, retain and reward exceptional employees. We also provide tools to help compensation and benefit managers analyze market data efficiently and conduct in-depth analysis to aid future program planning.
The role
Maintain and expand assigned Data Services industry, and contribute to reward solution in projects to achieve business objectives
Performance Objectives:
Client
• Provide value-added consulting services for clients and build community relationship to maintain long-term client relationship and expand own client database
• Demonstrate natural ease and effectiveness when dealing with clients/colleagues at all levels
Excellence
• Plan and deliver annual Data Services reports to ensure the report quality and on-time delivery
• Contribute to reward solution projects through continued professional growth for achieving the LOB’s business objectives
• Conduct knowledge sharing or contribute article to professional magazine to build personal brand
• Demonstrate the ability to integrate industry and compensation domain knowledge to provide best solution for clients
Financial
• Meet chargeable hours targets
• Take proactive actions to probe and identify clients’ potential needs to create derivative business opportunities
People
• Build relationships internally and collaborate effectively on cross-functional teams
The Requirements:
A degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Business, Finance, Human Resources, Social Studies, or a related field
Minimum of 1-2 years of relevant work experience in human resources, data analysis, or a related field
Strong knowledge of statistical methods, data analysis, and presentation
Experience in quantitative and qualitative surveys is a definite advantage
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, PowerPoint, PowerBI and other data analysis programs
Ability to produce high-quality written work, such as business reports or proposals
Ability to convey ideas in a coherent, fluent, and logical manner
Good written and verbal communication skills in English and Mandarin
Analytical, accurate, and detail-oriented with the ability to apply analytical skills and methodologies to solve problems
A good team player with a high degree of personal initiative and a keen interest in pursuing a long-term career in the consulting business
Equal Opportunity Employer
WTW is an equal opportunities employer and does not discriminate on any basis. We support flexible working and this role will be considered on a flexible basis.
company_box_content: At WTW (NASDAQ: WTW), we provide data-driven, insight-led solutions in the areas of people, risk and capital. Leveraging the global view and local expertise of our colleagues serving 140 countries and markets, we help you sharpen your strategy, enhance organizational resilience, motivate your workforce and maximize performance.

head: Senior Subject Matter Expert – Electrical & Controls
info: 常州-无锡-苏州地区 · 重新发布时间: 17 小时前 · 19 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Are you an experienced Electrical Power and/or Control Engineer, ready for your next challenge? If so then this fantastic opportunity at our Wuxi campus could be what you have been looking for!

At AstraZeneca, we’re not afraid to do things differently. We’re resetting expectations of what a bio-pharmaceutical company can be. This means we’re opening up new ways to work, pioneering cutting edge methods and bringing unexpected teams together. To develop life-changing medicines we approach problems in a different way – agile and forward-thinking, and focused on what our people need to make ground breaking discoveries.
Business Area

Global Engineering works closely with the Operations, R&D and Commercial functions within AstraZeneca to deliver major capital investments for the company (typically over $10million). The capital expansion program involves the engineering, construction and qualification of both new and growing assets. In addition to the asset provision activities, Global Engineering supports the Business by providing technical support to sites and other global functions. Global Engineering is made up of a mixture of Project Managers, Project Control Specialists, Project Technical Managers and Subject Matter Experts. These positions fit into project teams and work directly with third party design and construction partners to deliver facilities that meet AstraZeneca’s requirements for safety, quality, time and cost.

This exciting role within Global Engineering, will be centred on working either within project teams or on your own initiative in support of overseeing design, installation and commissioning of Electrical & Control systems within the Asia-Pacific region.
Approximately 20% of your time will be spent travelling within the Asia-Pacific region.
Responsibilities

Your technical knowledge and experience will enable you to prioritise your efforts into areas of high risk, to review and comment on designs effectively and to quickly resolve any issues which may arise. Stakeholder engagement and management is key to the success of this position.

You'll work closely with Project Managers and Project Technical Managers to ensure the technical scope of any projects are aligned with both business and project needs. You'll be involved in setting technical direction for the design work carried out by external consultants and contractors.
Responsible for evaluating the technical competence of design and construction contractors supporting the Project Manager in their selection for projects.

You'll provide engineering technical support for AstraZeneca due diligence projects, ensuring that standards, processes and validations are all appropriate and that technical learnings are captured and disseminated post project completion.
You'll be involved in multiple projects concurrently and will need to effectively communicate with clients / end users and designers to ensure efficient technical solutions are provided.
Essential Requirements
A Degree qualified Electrical Power and/or Control Engineer

Experienced in the specification, procurement, maintenance, installation and commissioning of electrical/control systems in the pharmaceutical R&D and Operations environment (or other comparable industries such as chemical, oil/gas, health care, automated manufacturing etc).
Proficient communicator (written and verbal) in English.
Mobility within Asia-Pacific region.
Self-motivated and able to work on own initiative but also able to be a strong team interaction skills.

At AstraZeneca, we 're dedicated to being a Great Place to Work. Where you are empowered to push the boundaries of science and unleash your entrepreneurial spirit. There’s no better place to make a difference to medicine, patients and society. An inclusive culture that champions diversity and collaboration. Always committed to lifelong learning, growth and development.

There are so many excellent employee benefits that AstraZeneca offer. AstraZeneca can offer you a competitive salary, private healthcare, a generous holiday allowance, excellent training and development opportunities, and much more.
Interested? Come and join our journey!
1. A Degree qualified Electrical Power and/or Control Engineer

2. Experienced in the specification, procurement, maintenance, installation and commissioning of electrical/control systems in the pharmaceutical R&D and Operations environment (or other comparable industries such as chemical, oil/gas, health care, automated manufacturing etc).
3. Proficient communicator (written and verbal) in English.
4. Mobility within Asia-Pacific region.
5. Self-motivated and able to work on own initiative but also able to be a strong team interaction skills.

job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
Get to Know our
Team:

The Performance Marketing Team of Agoda is a world leader in online marketing. This department is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers through measurable marketing programs and channels. The team is a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists, and data scientists in the world. The marketing leadership at Agoda have deep experience in data science, product, strategy, and other marketing fields and have built an organization that thrives on data, creative ideas, and technology. The Performance Marketing Team also fosters a great learning environment. You will be able to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a variety of backgrounds from all over the world.
In this Role, you’ll get
to:
Search: Experiment with text ads, bidding, and campaign structures on Google, Bing, Baidu, Naver, and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
Display: Test, analyze, and optimize campaigns on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and others.
Modeling: Analyze the vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop models we can use for optimization, and build dashboards for account managers.
What you’ll Need to
Succeed:
Bachelor’s Degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, economics, engineering, statistics or science)
Fresh graduation are welcome (0-1 years of experience)
Ability to communicate fluently in English
Basic business acumen
Proficient in statistics and Excel
Exposure to data tools (SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL, Tableau)
Familiar with A/B testing concepts
Works under close supervision and supports projects with guidance
It’s Great if you
Have:
Experience in digital marketing
Academic research experience

company_box_content: At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. We aim to make it easy and rewarding for more travelers to explore and experience the amazing world we live in. head: Senior Analyst (Supply Analytics, Bangkok-based, Relocation provided)
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 重新发布时间: 9 小时前 · 2 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
THIS ROLE IS BASED IN BANGKOK, THAILAND (WITH RELOCATION PROVIDED)
Location: Bangkok, Thailand (*Not open for remote work)
Get to Know our Team:

As part of the Supply Analytics, you will be responsible for identifying new partners and opportunities, cultivating a relationship with them, and working together with them to deliver the best outcome for our end customers. You would also be responsible with managing the day-to-day interaction with the partner and working closely with other teams within Agoda to ensure the partners needs are met.

We design tailored business and product solutions with our partners and help them generate measurable value. Members of our team are empowered and supported to grow their market(s) or accounts. We develop win-win relationships and leverage Agoda’s unique accommodations portfolio and tech solutions to bring our partners the advantages they seek. Utilizing our strong brand and resources, we build new channels to increase the visibility of Agoda, introduce more travelers to our great products and service and deliver significant revenues to the overall business.
The Opportunity:

As a Senior Analyst, you will report directly to either the Senior Manager or Associate Director within the Supply Department and this will be an individual contributor role. You will be responsible and fully empowered to work with the partners on the ground. You will be supported by a team within the Supply department and work closely with other Team members within Agoda.
In this Role, you’ll get to
Translate internal briefs into analytical projects (to include refining the initial brief and asking the ‘right questions’, working through potential hypotheses and storyboarding the output)
Use and analyze data from multiple large-scale data warehouses and present statistically strong analysis to a wide range of business stakeholders.
Proactively identify opportunities for growth within supply and the wider business.
Drive new analytical initiatives and projects aimed at improving organizational efficiency and shaping Agoda supply.
Identify, support, and lead projects aimed at scaling up the way the Supply organization leverages on data, insights, and intelligence.
Automate manual operational processes and present back on time savings gained through modernization of business operations
What you’ll Need to Succeed
At least 2-5+ years of experience working as an Analyst with experience in analytics/data science/insights/strategy/BI
Advanced working knowledge and hands-on experience in SQL
Strong knowledge and hands-on experience in data visualization tools such as Tableau (preferably)
Expert domain of data analysis and data visualization tools and software such as Excel, Python (or R)
Bachelor’s degree ideally in a business or quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).
A good understanding of statistical modelling knowledge or any machine learning technique knowledge (such as hypothesis testing, regression, logistic regression, random forest, etc.)
Good stakeholder management experience. Comfortable presenting to senior leadership and C-suite.
Experience in conducting A/B testing experimentation
Strong experience in finding data insights and provide business recommendation to the business

A hacker’s mindset – the ability to build simple but clever and elegant solutions to new problems within significant resource, operational and time constraints through deep understanding of the business, creative problem solving, and a wide range of expertise in data, analytics, automation, programming, and prototyping.
Excellent communicator with superior written, verbal, presentation and interpersonal communication skills.
Data driven in both decision making and performance measurement.
Extreme comfort in ambiguous, fast-paced environment.
Ability to multi-task, prioritize and coordinate resources.
It’s Great if you Have:
MBA or Masters in a quantitative subject (e.g. computer science, mathematics, engineering, science, economics or finance).
Program management certifications (e.g. PMI, PRINCE2) to compliment your program management experience.
Asian market experience.
Travel industry / e-commerce / tech / consulting experience.

info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 8 小时前 · 11 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Agoda

At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.

Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.

No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
This role is based in Bangkok, Thailand, and is open to candidates worldwide. We offer a generous relocation package to ensure a smooth transition to living and working in Bangkok.
Get to Know our
Team:

The Performance Marketing Team of Agoda is a world leader in online marketing. This department is highly data-driven and focused on developing at-scale marketing programs that improve the lifetime value of Agoda customers through measurable marketing programs and channels. The team is a blend of the best analysts, marketing strategists, and data scientists in the world. The marketing leadership at Agoda have deep experience in data science, product, strategy, and other marketing fields and have built an organization that thrives on data, creative ideas, and technology. The Performance Marketing Team also fosters a great learning environment. You will be able to learn and grow by working closely with experts from a variety of backgrounds from all over the world.
In this Role, you’ll get
to:
Search: Experiment with text ads, bidding, and campaign structures on Google, Bing, Baidu, Naver, and other search engines. Adapt to new product features and roll out changes from successful tests.
Display: Test, analyze, and optimize campaigns on Facebook, Twitter, Instagram, and others.
Modeling: Analyze the vast amounts of data generated by experiments, develop models we can use for optimization, and build dashboards for account managers.
What you’ll Need to
Succeed:
2–3 years of experience
Bachelor’s Degree or higher from top university in a quantitative subject (computer science, mathematics, economics, engineering, statistics or science)
Strong English communication
Solid business acumen
Strong statistical and analytical skills
Proficient in Excel and hands-on with data tools (SAS, R, SPSS, Python, VBA, SQL, Tableau)
Experience designing and analyzing A/B tests
Works independently on daily analytics tasks and provides business recommendations
It’s Great if you
Have:
Experience in digital marketing
Academic research experience

head: FP&A Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Job Description
Who are we?
Recognized as “the stand-out brand in the EHS consulting market” by independent research firm Verdantix, dss+ is a global
operations management consulting company that has been advising leading industrial companies around the world for
over 50 years. We leverage not only 200 years of DuPont experience in operating high-hazard facilities around the world,
but also the unique talents of our expert consultants. Our strength is our people – a diverse team of individuals with
experience across a broad range of industries, functions and disciplines.
dss+ services fall into three core areas—operational risk management, operational excellence, and sustainability—each
bolstered by learning, development and culture change solutions and digital technologies. Teams around the globe work
with clients in metals and mining, chemicals, oil and gas, power and utilities, agriculture, food and beverage, industrial and
manufacturing, and private equity.
Companies come to us because they want to bring about lasting change that makes them safer, more dynamic and more
productive places to work. They trust us because we have real life experience of the situations they face
we help them
implement and operationalize their solutions and we are passionate about what we do. We zero in on what matters:
protecting and improving lives, operations and assets.
What will we offer?
The FP&A Analyst is a business advocate, influencing decisions with a forward-looking perspective, while ensuring timely and
accurate delivery of all management reports.
This is an excellent opportunity to work with a highly competent team and apply your FP&A and business partnership
capabilities to assist in the regional Budgeting & Forecasting and business operational processes.
Who are we looking for?
Reporting to the Senior FP&A Regional Leader of AP, we are looking for an experienced FP&A Analyst. This new role can be
based in Beijing, Shanghai, Singapore, or India.
Member of FP&A Team, assisting in the implementation of strategic plans as well as financial assessment of prospective
business opportunities/initiatives.
The candidate will work for the AP Region in close collaboration with the Senior FP&A Regional Leader covering all
markets.
What will you do?
Assist with the budgeting, forecasting and business planning processes for the AP region. Establishing
appropriate inputs/outputs, timetables, and necessary levels of analysis to clearly ‘tell the story’, to enable
informed decisions to be made by the business.
You will provide support to the AP Senior FP&A Regional Leader to help drive deeper understanding of sales
pipeline, revenues, contract sold pricing, project, and customer profitability.
Actively review the projects with project controllers in F&O and CRM, making sure that all the expenses/costs
are charged to the project and Backlog/Milestones maintenance is 100% accurate all the time.
Assist in making a difference in AP Region/Market performance: Push for FSE chargeability and utilization, A/R
follow up on a weekly basis with business, track performance of the projects in Power BI
challenge/analyze
with the PMs when the project has deviations, or you spot any concerns.
Assist the AP Senior FP&A Regional Leader in being a Finance Business Partner to other team members within
Corporate Controlling. Providing Data & Analytics whenever profound and in-depth knowledge about financial
planning is required.
Planning, executing and/or leading selected special projects that require cross-functional engagement and
external stakeholders, controlling project activities to fulfil objectives and satisfy project requirements.
M&A Activities: Hands-on execution of financial and operational matters from due diligence to post-acquisition
integration.
Work regularly with the AP Senior FP&A Regional Leager on financial matters and ad-hoc requests,
proposals/tenders, etc. Support the AP Region in implementing and coordinating economic analysis, identifying KPI and profit drivers.
Job Requirements
Who are you?
To be successful in this position, you would bring the following qualifications:
EDUCATION:
Accredited University degree / Diploma in Finance, Accounting or Business
EXPERIENCE:
Experience in Financial Planning & Analysis and project costing.
Experience in a professional services firm is advantageous.
Exceptionally good command of ERP systems (Microsoft Dynamics 365 desirable) and advanced Power Point, Excel skills including macros, Pivot Tables and Power BI.
Hands-on, pragmatic, able to translate theoretical knowledge into business reality.
Team player focused on results and collaboration.
Proven experience of business partnering, commercial acumen and understanding business strategy.
Excellent financial communication skills tailored for senior leaders and the ability to influence, collaborate, and build relationships across global teams.
A keen learner with a strong desire to develop skills in financial planning and analysis.
Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.
Strong attention to detail and ability to work with large datasets.
Strong organizational skills, structured, results driven. Able to cope with changing environment and priorities.
Ability to work independently and as part of a team in a fast-paced environment

head: GoTo Financial - Algorithm Expert
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 30 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About The Role

As an algorithm member in the Search and Recommendations Platform team, you will work alongside top talent in China and Singapore to shape the intelligence behind GoFood and GoPay systems. You will design and deploy cutting-edge search, recommendations, and monetisation models that power on-demand and financial use cases across Indonesia. In your first six months, you will play a key role in launching foundational platform capabilities and collaborating with business-facing data science teams, to drive business impact and improve user experience.
What You Will Do
Design and implement algorithms for search, recommendation, or advertising systems to drive discovery and conversion across Goto products.

Build advanced user behaviour models and query/assortment understanding models using LLMs and LLVMs to improve matching accuracy between users, queries, and items across search and recommendation systems.
Plan at least the next 6 months roadmap and lead junior members to design&implement solutions, and evaluate the performance
Collaborate with product, engineering, and business-facing data science teams to define problems, run experiments, and deploy solutions at scale.
What You Will Need
Master’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Machine Learning, NLP, CV, or a related field
strong programming skills in Python, C++, or Java.
Hands-on experience with search/ recommendation/ads systems, with proven improvements to ranking, retrieval, or ad targeting models.
Familiarity with LLMs and/or LLVMs, with experience integrating them into search or recommendation pipelines a strong plus.

Demonstrated ability to innovate with new algorithms or tools and drive measurable impact, especially making use of Large language Models (LLMs) and Large Language and Vision models (LLVMs) in search modeling or recommendation modeling
Strong product intuition and ability to reason from user behavior data and traffic patterns.
Good communication skills in English, both written and verbal.
Self-motivated, curious, and excited by the opportunity to build high-impact systems quickly.
About The Team

We’re a growing team of algorithm members and engineers spread across China and Singapore. We build the core search and recommendation platform capabilities to power use cases all across the GoTo universe. Everyone on the team shares a bias towards action and a passion for deploying models and strategies to real-world problems - where it’s improving ranking and relevance accuracy, scaling LLM-powered retrieval, or personalising customer journeys.
We believe algorithms and engine applications are team sports. We work openly, challenge ideas with curiosity, and support one another to build systems that move the business forward
About GoTo Group

GoTo Group is the largest digital ecosystem in Indonesia with its mission to “Empower Progress’ by offering technological infrastructure and solutions for everyone to access and thrive in the digital economy. The GoTo ecosystem consists of on-demand transportation services, food and grocery delivery, logistics and fulfillment, as well as financial and payment services through the Gojek and GoTo Financial platforms.It is the first platform in Southeast Asia that hosts these crucial cases in a single ecosystem, capturing the majority of Indonesia’s vast consumer household.
About Gojek

Gojek is Southeast Asia’s leading on-demand platform and pioneer of the multi-service ecosystem with over 2.5 million driver partners across the regions offering a wide range of services such as transportation, food delivery, logistics and more. With its mission to create impact at scale, Gojek is committed to resolving consumer problems and raising standards of living by connecting consumers to the best providers of goods and services in the market.
About GoTo Financial

GoTo Financial accelerates financial inclusion through its leading financial services and merchants solutions. Its consumer services include GoPay and GoPayLater and serve businesses of all sizes through Midtrans, Moka, GoBiz Plus, GoBiz, and Selly. With its trusted and inclusive ecosystem of products, GoTo Financial is open to new growth opportunities and aims to empower everyone to Make It Happen, Make It Together, Make It Last.

GoTo and its business units, including Gojek and GoToFinancial ("GoTo") only post job opportunities on our official channels on our respective company websites and on LinkedIn. GoTo is not liable for any job postings or job offers that did not originate from us. You should conduct your own due diligence to prevent being victims of any fake job scams, if they did not originate from GoTo's official recruitment channels.
1. Design and implement algorithms for search, recommendation, or advertising systems to drive discovery and conversion across Goto products.

2. Build advanced user behaviour models and query/assortment understanding models using LLMs and LLVMs to improve matching accuracy between users, queries, and items across search and recommendation systems.
3. Plan at least the next 6 months roadmap and lead junior members to design&implement solutions, and evaluate the performance
4. Collaborate with product, engineering, and business-facing data science teams to define problems, run experiments, and deploy solutions at scale.
1. Master’s degree or higher in Computer Science, Machine Learning, NLP, CV, or a related field; strong programming skills in Python, C++, or Java.
2. Hands-on experience with search/ recommendation/ads systems, with proven improvements to ranking, retrieval, or ad targeting models.
3. Familiarity with LLMs and/or LLVMs, with experience integrating them into search or recommendation pipelines a strong plus.

4. Demonstrated ability to innovate with new algorithms or tools and drive measurable impact, especially making use of Large language Models (LLMs) and Large Language and Vision models (LLVMs) in search modeling or recommendation modeling
5. Strong product intuition and ability to reason from user behavior data and traffic patterns.
6. Good communication skills in English, both written and verbal.
7. Self-motivated, curious, and excited by the opportunity to build high-impact systems quickly.

head: 数据分析师-影像App（北京）
info: 中国 北京市 海淀区 · 2 个月前 · 26 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
岗位职责：
● 负责核心业务指标体系的构建与维护，通过日常数据监控与异常排查，及时发现并诊断业务健康度，输出日报、周报等数据看板，为业务部门提供高效的数据支持
● 深入理解用户行为、商业模式与业务流程，主动开展专项分析，如版本迭代、用户行为、增长策略、商业化变现等，找出用户行为规律，并输出高质量的分析洞察与 actionable 的优化建议，为产品和运营决策提供引导
● 独立负责或协同产品、运营、算法团队，进行A/B实验的设计、数据分析与结果评估，为产品功能、运营策略和算法优化提供数据支撑
● 负责业务数据埋点需求的梳理、评审及验收，确保数据采集的准确性、完整性与规范性，为后续分析工作提供高质量数据基础
任职要求：
● 3年以上互联网行业数据分析经验，对用户行为数据有深刻理解，有影像或工具类App相关经验者优先
● 掌握SQL，能独立完成复杂数据查询与提取熟悉Python/R等至少一门脚本语言，能进行数据处理与统计分析
● 熟用数据分析方法、A/B实验基础理论，并有丰富的应用经验
●熟悉工具（如Tableau、PowerBI、Superset等）并有实际报表开发经验
● 业务理解力：具备强烈的业务同理心和敏锐度，能够快速理解业务需求，并将业务问题转化为数据分析问题，提供有效的解决方案
● 沟通表达：具备优秀的结构化思维和书面表达能力，能清晰、准确地向非技术人员解释
● 复杂的数据洞察，并能有效推动项目落地
● 解决问题能具备独立思考和解决问题的能力，能在面对模糊需求和业务挑战时，主动探索并提出建设性方案
● 具备高度的责任心与owner意识，以结果为导向，能主动发现并推动解决问题
● 严谨、客观的数度，对数据和业务充满好奇心，渴望通过数据洞察为产品和业务带来真正的价值
加分项：
● 有商业用户增长、内容推荐等专项数据分析经验
● 有海外渠道投放或分验
● 有过用户分层体系、用像等项目经验
Responsibilities:
1. Basic Business Analysis & Monitoring:

● Responsible for constructing and maintaining core business indicator systems. Monitor daily data and troubleshoot anomalies to promptly identify and diagnose business health. Produce daily/weekly reports and data dashboards to provide efficient data support for business departments.
2. Specialized Analysis & Business Insight:

● Deeply understand user behavior, business models, and workflows. Proactively conduct specialized analyses (e.g., version iterations, user behavior, growth strategies, commercialization) to identify user behavior patterns. Deliver high-quality analytical insights and actionable optimization suggestions to guide product and operational decisions.
3. A/B Testing Analysis:

● Independently or collaboratively design A/B tests with product, operations, and algorithm teams. Perform data analysis and result evaluation to support product features, operational strategies, and algorithm optimization.
4. Data Collection & Governance:

● Organize, review, and validate business data tracking requirements to ensure accuracy, completeness, and standardization of data collection, providing a high-quality data foundation for subsequent analysis.
Qualifications:
1. Experience & Knowledge:
● 3+ years of data analysis experience in the internet industry, with deep understanding of user behavior data. Experience in imaging or tool-based Apps is preferred.
● Proficient in SQL, capable of independently handling complex data queries and extraction. Familiar with at least one scripting language (Python/R) for data processing and statistical analysis.
● Familiar with common data analysis methods and A/B testing fundamentals, with substantial practical application experience.
● Experience with BI tools (e.g., Tableau, Power BI, Superset) and practical report development.
2. Abilities & Soft Skills:
● Business Acumen: Strong business empathy and sensitivity, able to quickly understand business needs, translate business problems into data analysis tasks, and provide effective solutions.

● Communication Skills: Excellent structured thinking and written expression, capable of clearly and accurately explaining complex data insights to non-technical stakeholders and effectively driving project implementation.
● Problem-Solving: Independent thinking and problem-solving abilities, able to proactively explore and propose constructive solutions amid ambiguous requirements and business challenges.
3. Motivation & Values:
● High sense of responsibility and ownership, results-driven, and proactive in identifying and resolving issues.
● Rigorous and objective data attitude, curious about data and business, and eager to deliver real value through data insights.
Preferred Qualifications:
● Experience in specialized data analysis (e.g., commercialization, user growth, content recommendation).
● Experience with overseas channel promotion or analysis.
● Project experience in user segmentation systems or user profiling.
company_box_content: Founded in 2008, Meitu is an AI-driven technology company that regards “beauty” as its core ideal. Meitu is committed to creating excellent photo, video and design products that make the creation of images, videos, and designs easier and helping to digitally upgrade the industry through solutions for beauty industry.
Meitu was listed on the main board of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange in December 2016 with the stock code: 1357.HK.
As of December 31st 2024, Meitu has 266 million monthly active users globally and 94.51 million monthly active users outside of Mainland China.

head: Packaging Developer II
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 2 个月前 · 35 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
ROLE SUMMARY

The objective of this packaging development manager role is to lead end-to-end packaging development projects, providing advice and solutions regarding all technical requirements to our Modern Oral (MO) Category.

An excellent working knowledge of different packaging substrates such as rigids plastics, printed flexibles, labels, and cartons is required. Working closely with our product innovation, marketing, procurement, supply chain, manufacturing, compliance, legal and quality, the Packaging development manager will own packaging specifications and implementation process to MO new and existing product portfolio.
Strong communication, innovation and influencing skills will be critical to this role to build strong relationships with both internal and external stakeholders.
Reports to
Packaging Development Manager – Modern Oral
Number of Direct Reports
N/A
Core Relationships
Internal –
Consumable Develop and Discovery
Product Development Leads,
Global Packaging Community, Procurement, Supply Chain, Ops, Insights, Commercial Brand Team
External
– External Suppliers, Contract Manufacturers
Geographic Scope
Global
Travel Required
Travel to suppliers/conferences as required
Travel to other BAT sites as required (estimated 4-5 trips per year).
ACCOUNTABILITIES
1. Manage complex projects from design concept, prototype, build, and commercialization of rigids (plastics, metals), printed flexibles, labels, and carton structures.

2. Lead early-stage discovery activities (tech blocks) to identify emerging packaging technologies, materials, and design trends that align with consumer needs, sustainability goals, and business strategy.
3. Conduct feasibility assessments and material evaluations during the concept phase to inform packaging direction and innovation pipeline.
4. Provide technical support and collaborate with other functions of the business in resolving technical issues during design and development.
5. Provide technical support to procurement on new and existing packaging sourcing requirements, identifying and actualizing opportunities for cost and quality improvement.
6. Drive the sustainability agenda in collaboration with other functions to deliver on company ESG KPIs.
7. Participate in the development of Quality Control Plans with the BAT Quality team.
8. Travel to suppliers/plants to support development, fine-tuning, and/or specification release.
9. Attend material qualification trials and first-off production runs at manufacturing sites and suppliers as required.
10. Establish strong technical relationships with internal and external stakeholders.
Rigids Plastics
1. Lead projects through all stages of the injection moulding process, from concept evaluation through commercialization.
2. Lead development of specifications and acceptance protocols to enable the purchase and production of injection moulds and moulded components.
3. Lead pilot and commercial mould trials, ensuring new project launches are on schedule and successful.
4. Manage suppliers to ensure timely and standard-compliant design, development, and implementation of injection moulds and component conversion.
5. Develop processes by designing and/or performing experimental testing, data analysis, report preparation, and providing recommendations.
EXPERIENCE, SKILLS, KNOWLEDGE
1. Demonstrated ability to lead complex packaging development projects from scope of concept to market commercialisation.
2. Experience (>3 years) of packaging development of Injection Moulding packaging (plastic and metal) and flexible plastic packaging, experience of developing complex injection moulded packaging.
3. Experience of using CAD software (Solidworks, AutoCad etc.) and FEMS software (MoldFlow)
4. Knowledge of use and properties of common plastic materials especially polyolefins and global sustainability developments in plastics.
5. Knowledge of designing and modelling packaging to meet product stability requirements and consumer useability criteria.
6. Experience of rapid prototyping techniques especially related to development of injection moulded packaging.
7. Working knowledge of developing and validating Child Resistant/Senior Effective packaging
8. Strong engineering analysis skills including tolerance analysis, DFA, DFM, DFMEA, validation and documentation
9. Knowledge of use and properties of common plastic materials especially polyolefins and global sustainability developments in plastics.
10. Experience of working effectively in a global, cross functional team and a multi-category packaging team.
11. Networked with suppliers, academia, research institutes and FEI partners.
Interpersonal Skills Required
1. Effective communication, collaboration, and teamwork.
2. Resilience, empathy, self-awareness and emotional intelligence.
3. Persistence, tolerance to ambiguity, assertiveness and learning agility
4. Keep abreast of packaging sustainability, global sourcing development, trends, etc.
5. Planning and implementation skills.
6. Proficiency in Microsoft Office, Solidworks, AutoCad, CAPE, Adobe Illustrator and other software used in packaging.
EDUCATION / QUALIFICATIONS / CERTIFICATIONS
1. Science, Engineering or other relevant degree, or equivalent experience.
2. Six Sigma or Lean Programmes
3. Project Management certificate or qualifications

head: AI Agent产品经理（web端）
info: 中国 北京市 海淀区 · 2 个月前 · 47 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
岗位职责：
1.深入研究影像产品工具的各种AI应用场景，负责影像AI Agent产品应用落地；
2.在深入业务场景建设重点场景能力的同时，结合美图平台能力，建设孵化垂直领域的AI基建，面向未来设计分领域Agent；

4.负责对AI产品进行市场调研和国内外优质方案的分析学习，不断优化产品功能和用户体验；
5.跟进产品上线后的运营情况，分析数据并制定优化方案，持续提升产品价值。
职位要求：
1. 本科及以上学历，计算机、人工智能等相关专业优先；
2. 对AI领域充满热情，具备扎实的AI理解力与创新意识，尤其在AI Agent、AIGC等方向有实际参与或深刻思考者优先；
3. 具备优秀的产品规划能力与跨团队沟通协作能力，能够独立推进中大型AI项目落地；
4. 熟悉数据分析方法，具备数据驱动的产品迭代思维；
5. 热衷于用AI改造生产流程，对Prompt工程有一定认知和实践，善于使用AI Coding、Agent工具等探索解决方案者优先。
AI Product Manager - AI Agents（WEB）
Job Responsibilities:
Conduct in-depth research on diverse AI application scenarios for imaging products and tools
take ownership of the implementation and go-to-market strategy for our AI Agent imaging products.
Develop core capabilities for key business scenarios while leveraging the Meitu platform's strengths to build and incubate foundational AI infrastructure for vertical domains
design and architect future-oriented, domain-specific Agents.

Understand relevant AI technologies to effectively break down business objectives. Manage the product development lifecycle, coordinate cross-functional resources, and ensure timely product launches that achieve expected outcomes.

Conduct comprehensive market research and competitive analysis of AI products, studying best-in-class solutions both domestically and internationally. Continuously iterate and optimize product features and user experience.
Monitor post-launch product performance, analyze key metrics, and formulate data-driven optimization strategies to continuously enhance product value.
Job Requirements:
Bachelor's degree or higher in Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, or a related field.

Passionate about the field of AI, demonstrating a solid understanding of AI principles and a strong innovative spirit. Hands-on experience or deep, critical thinking in areas like AI Agents and AIGC is highly preferred.
Excellent product planning, cross-functional communication, and collaboration skills. Proven ability to independently drive the end-to-end execution of medium-to-large scale AI projects.
Proficient in data analysis methodologies, with a strong, data-driven mindset for product iteration and optimization.

Enthusiastic about using AI to transform productivity and workflows. A strong understanding of and practical experience with Prompt Engineering is highly desirable. Candidates skilled in using AI Coding, Agent tools, and similar platforms to explore and build solutions are preferred.

head: Data Analyst - China
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Voodoo

Founded in 2013, Voodoo is a tech company that creates mobile games and apps with a mission to entertain the world. Gathering 800 employees, 7 billion downloads, and over 200 million active users, Voodoo is the #3 mobile publisher worldwide in terms of downloads after Google and Meta. Our portfolio includes chart-topping games like Mob Control and Block Jam, alongside popular apps such as BeReal and Wizz.
Team

Our Gaming team is made up of hybrid-casual, casual and mid-core experts. Our 'Core' games team supports internal and external studios worldwide in creating, developing and launching new hit games, whilst our 'Live' games team focuses on delivering higher engagement on our existing and successful games.
You will join a dynamic, new team in China dedicated to collaborating closely with our Asian and Chinese studios. Your initial focus will be on
a slate of promising midcore games
from China, chosen for their compelling core mechanics and engaging gameplay. Our goal is to transform these games into successful, market-ready hits.
Role
Act as a trusted advisor on all things data, establishing best practices for data collection, analysis, and reporting.
Lead the analysis of large, complex datasets to understand player behavior and identify opportunities for growth in engagement, retention, and monetization.
Translate data insights into clear recommendations to inform game design, feature development, and the overall product roadmap.
Collaborate cross-functionally with game designers, product managers, and developers to ensure data-driven strategies are embedded throughout the game’s lifecycle.
Design, build, and maintain automated dashboards and reports, ensuring the entire team has access to critical metrics and insights.
Utilize A/B testing to evaluate and optimize game features and mechanics, driving measurable improvements in key performance indicators.
Profile
At least 2 years of analytical work experience in the gaming, tech or a data-driven industry, with a proven track record working in close connection with product teams.
Proficient with SQL and either R or Python, with a proven experience working with large and complex data sets.
Good knowledge of statistical analysis and concepts used for industry-standard methods like AB testing or forecasting.
Extensive gaming background with a deep understanding of product design.
Autonomous person with a strong analytical mind, problem-solving skills and strong attention to detail.
Ability to understand a business problem, turn it into an analytics/statistics problem and solve it using adequate methods.
Highly pragmatic mindset with the ability to quickly identify what needs to be focused on and what can be considered of lower priority.
Capacity to be the pro-active owner of the entire data chain for your game.
Working proficiency in both English and Chinese.
Benefits
Other benefits according to the country you reside

head: Planner
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 6 天前 · 31 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About AkzoNobel

Since 1792, we’ve been supplying the innovative paints and coatings that help to color people’s lives and protect what matters most. Our world class portfolio of brands – including Dulux, International, Sikkens and Interpon – is trusted by customers around the globe. We’re active in more than 150 countries and use our expertise to sustain and enhance the fabric of everyday life. Because we believe every surface is an opportunity. It’s what you’d expect from a pioneering and long-established paints company that’s dedicated to providing sustainable solutions and preserving the best of what we have today – while creating an even better tomorrow. Let’s paint the future together.
For more information please visit www.akzonobel.com
© 2024 Akzo Nobel N.V. All rights reserved.
Job Responsibilities
Long Description
Short Description
Job Purpose
Job Purpose
Key Accountabilities1
Distribution Requirements Planning:
Manage the supply and replenishments across the whole supply network & review mid term and long term outlook of the supply plan against resources and warehouse capacities.
Ensure consolidation of independent, dependent and distribution demand at SKU level.
Requirements inventory setting and DRP process management. Resolve exceptions in accordance with IBP rules.
Distribution plan full horizon/ weekly/ daily release for Stock Transfer Orders / ICDs depending on the flows.
Inventory plan volume and value projection and warehouse/ logistics capacity planning.
Reviews logistics schedule adherence and drive improvement including optimization of truck load management.
Manage demand exceptions with Demand managers/planner, logistics and Supply Planning Manager.
Drive gate keeping meetings with the other departments and support with providing relevant KPI’s to measure performance.
Provide impact analysis when needed to show the impact of decisions or scenarios to the plan. Support on reporting where necessary.
Balance service level (OTIF) and inventory targets (OWC) at the primary and/or secondary DC’s, while understanding cost impacts on manufacturing.
Manage reduction and prevention of slow and obsolete stock. Ensure rework and scrapping at the primary and/or secondary DC’s
Monitor FINI distributed to DCs as contact point to resolve over/under stock position. Execute and support allocation of constraint supply to demand/ create needed visibility through network.
Inputs to inventory strategy on existing, new and phase-out products.
Ensure master data correctness & proper housekeeping of transactional data.
Support projects and process improvement to enhance performance and efficiency of the required planning activities.
Key Accountabilities2
Production Planning
Manage the MPS/MRP process and resolve exceptions in accordance with IBP rules.
Master production plan release for production plant/ cells while keeping in line with agreements made on capacity.

Finite production and capacity planning based on factory calendar and EBQs. Make sure the Rough Cut Capacity Plan (RCCP) process and planned production capability exceptions for Supply Points are managed (x production sites and relevant tollers/TPMs).
Release production orders to the site in line with agreements made with the site. Review schedule adherence and drive improvement.
Manage demand exceptions with Scheduler and SP Manager. Support the site schedulers and site with analyses when needed to create visibility.
Work together with DRP Planners to understand customer requirements and incorporate this in the production plan.
Drive gate keeping meetings with the other departments and support with providing relevant KPI’s to measure performance.

Ensure master data correctness & proper housekeeping of transactional data.

Focused on results
Good problem-solving skills, able to identify and structure issues, run accurate analyses and synthesize recommendations
Strong desire to challenge and improve status-quo
Strong communication and interpersonal skills, flexibility and able to work under-pressure
Fluent and able to work in English. Understanding and sensitivity to different cultural behaviours.

head: Reinsurance Actuarial Analyst
info: 中国 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 93 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

We are seeking a talented individual to join our Reinsurance Actuarial team at Guy Carpenter. This role will be based in Shanghai. This is a hybrid role that has a requirement of working at least three days a week in the office.
We will count on you to:
Organizes client data, checks data for reasonability, loads data into predictive models, runs the models and shares output with senior actuaries to help determine client's degree of risk
Performs basic calculations with client data to assess a range of risk exposures and predict outcomes for clients in support of reinsurance transaction process
Collects and analyzes industry data and updates the trending process in the predictive models to support advisory work
Conducts research on industry/regulatory developments that affect loss liabilities to determine the impact on clients
Keeps teams updated on industry-specific and speciality related trends that may affect reinsurance programs/calculations
Performs simple calculations using the MetaRisk model to help assess outcomes for clients
What you need to have:
Master degree in Actuarial Science/Finance/Economics/Statistics or related discipline (for HK candidate, miminum degree can be Bachelor)
1-2 year work experience in actuarial field would be a plus. Open to recent graduates.
Desire to learn and further develop in the broader risk management field.
Strong analytical and data skills with the ability to multitask and balance priorities.
Outstanding computer and technical skills. Proficiency with Microsoft Office especially working with Excel, PowerPoint and Word.
Strong communication and presentation skills, independent and diligent.
Proficiency in spoken and written English and Chinese.
Open to fresh graduates with relevant internship experience.
Why join our team:
We help you be your best through professional development opportunities, interesting work and supportive leaders.
We foster a vibrant and inclusive culture where you can work with talented colleagues to create new solutions and have impact for colleagues, clients and communities.
Our scale enables us to provide a range of career opportunities, as well as benefits and rewards to enhance your well-being.

At Guy Carpenter, you can be your best. We work on challenges that matter with colleagues who help bring out our best. Our uniquely collaborative environment will empower you to focus on your personal and professional success, learning from top specialists in the (re)insurance industry and leading you towards a rewarding and impactful career.

Guy Carpenter, a business of Marsh McLennan (NYSE: MMC), is a leading global risk advisory and reinsurance specialist and broker. Marsh McLennan is a global leader in risk, strategy and people, advising clients in 130 countries across four businesses: Marsh, Guy Carpenter, Mercer and Oliver Wyman. With annual revenue of $24 billion and more than 90,000 colleagues, Marsh McLennan helps build the confidence to thrive through the power of perspective. For more information, visit guycarp.com, or follow on LinkedIn and X.

Marsh McLennan is committed to embracing a diverse, inclusive and flexible work environment. We aim to attract and retain the best people and embrace diversity of age background, disability, ethnic origin, family duties, gender orientation or expression, marital status, nationality, parental status, personal or social status, political affiliation, race, religion and beliefs, sex/gender, sexual orientation or expression, skin color, or any other characteristic protected by applicable law. In the recruitment process, Marsh McLennan does not restrict a position to a particular gender, does not inquire or investigate the marital or maternal status of female candidates, does not impose any limitations on marriage or childbirth, does not use marital or maternal status of a condition for hiring, and does not raise the qualification standard for female candidates. When you apply for a position with us, we must obtain Personal Data, which is any data that can directly or indirectly lead to the identification of a specific individual, such as your name, contact information, employment history, education information, work skills, and licensure and certifications (if applicable). We also collect any other information you have provided in your CV, covering letter, application form, or during an interview (if applicable). Marsh McLennan limits the Personal Data that it collects to that which is relevant and proportionate for the intended purpose. Where necessary and permitted or required by law, we may collect Personal Data deemed sensitive under applicable law (for example, ethnicity, fitness to work or criminal convictions information).
