head: Platform Partnerships Associate (Shenzhen)
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 2 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About Tencent

Tencent is an Internet-based platform company founded in Shenzhen, China, in 1998. We use technology to enrich the lives of Internet users and assist the digital upgrade of enterprises. Our mission is "Value for Users, Tech for Good". We embrace a culture of teamwork & creativity and are driven by our values - Integrity, Proactivity, Collaboration and Creativity.

We are rapidly expanding our international operations and are looking for top talent to propel us forward. Combining the results-oriented nature of a start-up with the resources of a profitable and leading Internet company, Tencent offers a unique opportunity for aspiring individuals to thrive.
About IEG Global
Tencent Games was established in 2003. We are a leading global platform for game development, operations and publishing, and the largest online game community in China.

Tencent Games has developed and operated over 140 games. We provide cross-platform interactive entertainment experience for more than 800 million users in over 200 countries and regions around the world. Honor of Kings, PUBG MOBILE, and League of Legends, are some of our most popular titles around the world.

Meanwhile, we actively promote the development of esports industry, work with global partners to build an open, collaborative and symbiotic industrial ecology, and create high-quality digital life experiences for players.
Job Responsibilities
1. Assist in maintaining and expanding relationships with key gaming platforms and partners, supporting daily communications and operational tasks.
2. Support game release and submission processes under supervision, ensuring smooth coordination with platforms while learning platform policies and requirements.
3. Collaborate with internal teams (development, operation, marketing, branding, analytics) to collect and relay platform requirements, ensuring clear and timely communication.
4. Conduct market and competitor research, preparing basic reports to support business and strategic decisions.
5. Assist in executing promotional and advertising initiatives, including asset preparation, coordination, and campaign performance tracking.
6. Support optimization of game visibility across digital storefronts and partner programs, including content updates, pricing adjustments, and promotional initiatives.
7. Fostering growth through data-driven decisions and creative problem-solving.
Job Requirements
1. Education: Bachelor’s degree or higher.
2. Experience: Minimum 1 year in business development, operations, marketing, or analytics (internships included), with some familiarity with the gaming industry.
3. Strong passion for gaming, especially PC and console, with awareness of player communities and platform trends.
4. Excellent communication and collaboration skills, able to work effectively in cross-functional and multicultural teams.
5. Proactive, eager to learn, with strong execution skills; able to handle multiple tasks under pressure and deliver results.
6. Language: Fluent in Mandarin and English; Japanese is a plus.
Preferred Qualifications
1. Experience in console or PC game releasing and merchandising processes.
2. Familiarity with digital advertising, retail distribution, or channel promotion.
3. Basic data analysis skills; proficiency in Excel or BI tools; SQL/Python skills are a plus.

2、3 年以上财务分析相关经验，游戏、互联网行业相关经验者优先；

4、具备良好的学习能力、沟通能力及抗压能力，认真、仔细、有责任心。

head: Data Scientist
info: 中国 上海市 浦东新区 · 2 个月前 · 超过 100 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

We are seeking a highly skilled and proactive Data Scientist to join our Data Science & Analytics team. This role focuses on building predictive models, exploring generative AI applications, and delivering data-driven solutions to support operational and business needs. The ideal candidate will have strong technical expertise, excellent communication skills, and a passion for innovation.
Responsibilities
1. Lead and contribute to predictive modeling projects, including data quality verification, exploratory data analysis, rule engine development, model training, and performance optimization.

2. Explore and apply generative AI technologies, including multimodal large models and large language models (LLMs), to solve real-world problems such as compliance assessment and failure mode classification.
3. Design and implement data reporting solutions tailored to operational and site-specific business requirements.
4. Collaborate cross-functionally with QA, business stakeholders, and engineering teams to ensure timely and high-quality delivery.
5. Document development processes and design decisions in English, and maintain version control using Git.
Experience / Qualifications
1. Bachelor’s degree or above in Computer Science, Software Engineering, Data Science, or related field.
2. Minimum 5 years of experience in data science, machine learning, or AI-related roles.
3. Proficient in Python and Spark, with hands-on experience in libraries such as Pandas, Scikit-learn, PySpark, and Spark MLlib.
4. Experience with Databricks for managing ML experiments, building LLM services, and performing model fine-tuning.
5. Solid understanding of statistical analysis, feature engineering, and prompt engineering.
6. Familiar with Python unit testing frameworks such as Pytest and UnitTest.
7. Strong SQL skills and understanding of database performance optimization.
8. Experience with Web APIs, with attention to performance and security.
9. Familiar with Git for branch and version control.
10. Excellent communication skills and ability to write and read English technical documentation.
11. Experience contributing to open-source projects or participating in community discussions is a plus.
12. Knowledge of Azure Cloud is preferred.

1、深入理解业务战略和人力资源体系，通过数据分析、行业调研、专家访谈等方式，诊断人力资源管理中的关键问题，设计优化方案，并推动执行落地；

head: Market Intelligence Analyst
info: 中国 四川省 成都市 · 1 个月前 · 38 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Position Overview（药企背景优先考虑）
This role is cross-disciplinary opportunity to work at the intersection of
pharma/medical devices regulatory affairs, life sciences digital solutions, corporate strategy, and B2B marketing.
The successful candidate will provide analytical and operational support for China strategy and growth team, while also assist and support marketing, business development, and other related tasks.
Key Responsibilities:
1. Conduct in-depth primary and secondary market research focused on the China life science regulatory environment, identifying trends, challenges, and opportunities.
2. Develop detailed profiles of target client segments, including pharmaceutical, biotech, and MedTech companies, understanding their regulatory needs and pain points.

3. Support and assist the Director with research, data gathering, and financial analysis, synthesize complex data into clear, actionable intelligence reports, dashboards, and presentations to support decision-making across business, operational, and marketing topics.
4. Develop and execute integrated B2B marketing campaigns to generate leads and build brand awareness within the life science sector.
5. Support marketing and business development by providing intelligence for pitches and proposals, representing the company at industry conferences and events (as required).
6. Measure and report on the performance of marketing campaigns, leveraging insights to optimize future activities.
Qualifications:

1. 5-8 years of relevant experience in the pharmaceutical industry (pharmaceuticals/medical devices), with 1~3 years of market research & analysis experience. Understanding of drug research and development, clinical development, regulatory requirements, and the pharmaceutical market.
2. Strong analytical, problem-solving, communication and execution skills.
3. Direct experience in a regulatory affairs role in multinational corporation (MNC) is an advantage.
4. Bilingual proficiency in Mandarin Chinese and English required.
5. Ability to work effectively across cultures, time zones and functions.
6. Master's degree or above degree in life sciences, pharmacy, medicine, or related fields.

company_box_content: 美团是一家科技零售公司。美团以“零售+科技”的战略践行“帮大家吃得更好，生活更好”的公司使命。
自2010年3月成立以来，美团持续推动服务零售和商品零售在需求侧和供给侧的数字化升级，和广大合作伙伴一起努力为消费者提供品质服务。2018年9月20日，美团在港交所挂牌上市。
美团始终以客户为中心，不断加大在新技术上的研发投入。美团会和大家一起努力，更好承担社会责任，更多创造社会价值。

head: Analyst / Associate - Rewards, Data & Intelligence, Beijing / Shanghai/ South China
info: 中国 广东省 · 1 个月前 · 67 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
The Business

WTW Data Services is a global centre of excellence for compensation, benefits and employment practices information. Our databases cover almost 100 countries, ensuring we can support companies wherever they do business. Our rigorous data processes, coupled with the depth of our databases, guarantee the delivery of high-quality, robust data and consistent reporting practices.

In addition to compensation surveys, we publish reference materials that help HR practitioners attract, retain and reward exceptional employees. We also provide tools to help compensation and benefit managers analyze market data efficiently and conduct in-depth analysis to aid future program planning.
The role
Maintain and expand assigned Data Services industry, and contribute to reward solution in projects to achieve business objectives
Performance Objectives:
Client
• Provide value-added consulting services for clients and build community relationship to maintain long-term client relationship and expand own client database
• Demonstrate natural ease and effectiveness when dealing with clients/colleagues at all levels
Excellence
• Plan and deliver annual Data Services reports to ensure the report quality and on-time delivery
• Contribute to reward solution projects through continued professional growth for achieving the LOB’s business objectives
• Conduct knowledge sharing or contribute article to professional magazine to build personal brand
• Demonstrate the ability to integrate industry and compensation domain knowledge to provide best solution for clients
Financial
• Meet chargeable hours targets
• Take proactive actions to probe and identify clients’ potential needs to create derivative business opportunities
People
• Build relationships internally and collaborate effectively on cross-functional teams
The Requirements:
A degree in Mathematics, Statistics, Business, Finance, Human Resources, Social Studies, or a related field
Minimum of 1-2 years of relevant work experience in human resources, data analysis, or a related field
Strong knowledge of statistical methods, data analysis, and presentation
Experience in quantitative and qualitative surveys is a definite advantage
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, Word, PowerPoint, PowerBI and other data analysis programs
Ability to produce high-quality written work, such as business reports or proposals
Ability to convey ideas in a coherent, fluent, and logical manner
Good written and verbal communication skills in English and Mandarin
Analytical, accurate, and detail-oriented with the ability to apply analytical skills and methodologies to solve problems
A good team player with a high degree of personal initiative and a keen interest in pursuing a long-term career in the consulting business
Equal Opportunity Employer
WTW is an equal opportunities employer and does not discriminate on any basis. We support flexible working and this role will be considered on a flexible basis.

head: Research Analyst / Consultant-Intelligence Center - Guangzhou(314952)
info: 中国 广东省 广州 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 79 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About The Business

Deloitte China established its Global Delivery Center (GDC) in Chongqing, a key growth engine of China, in 2015. The Center provides innovative, multi-lingual offerings that support compliance and advisory services. GDC helps drive maximum efficiency and provides centralized "plug and play" internal services, enabling a scope of work that serves global clients and the Deloitte network better, making a real impact that matters. The Deloitte GDC has established offices in Chongqing, Dalian, and Guangzhou.

The Consulting Intelligence Center is the center of excellence for the Strategy and Business Design(S&BD) team, as well as the wider consulting practice, focusing on research and data analytical work, acting as a hub to knowledge management and intelligence gathering to future market eminence. We are the bridge to connect clients with global resources and professional expertise as well as apply leading innovative technologies to solve business problems. We focus on research-oriented activities, allowing accumulation of industry knowledge and insights. The Consulting Intelligence Center will provide a platform for services such as market research, knowledge management, market eminence, enabling a foundation for tangible, long-term value delivery for our clients.
Work you'll do
Work you'll do：
Support the project team on strategizing and delivering solutions to clients to promote growth and address the evolving needs of their businesses

Conduct analysis in your vertical knowledge domain, serve as a point of contact for the project team to support clients making decisions and implementing enhancements to their organizations' strategy, productivity, performance, and long-term profitability
Analyze, and synthesize the market data into targeted end deliverables, such as single exhibits, written summaries, financial models, basic fact packs, spread sheets, to help fulfill client's needs
Support the project team with your vertical expertise to help them tackle some of the ad-hoc client requests, which includes but not limited to project follow-up, proposal preparation, etc.
Maintain an accurate and up-to-date knowledge base on your responsible knowledge domain
manage the data quality of the database, if there's any accumulated from the project

In some cases, you're expected to create and maintain some tools to bring vertical knowledge and capabilities to our project teams, including benchmarking databases, simulations, and skill-building training sessions, etc.
Along the way, you'll participate in a comprehensive training programs that will help you continuously grow and develop.

During your tenure with us, you will demonstrate and develop your leadership and professional capabilities in the following areas: Inspiring, Creating purpose, Driving agility, Building diverse capability, Influencing, Collaborating, Delivering value, Building the business, Analytical acumen, Effective communication, Engagement management/delivery excellence, Managing change, Managing quality & risk, Sales excellence, Strategic thinking and problem solving, and Tech savviness.
We are looking for someone with
Bachelor's degree and above, preferably from majors such as science, finance, management, engineering, automotive, healthcare, chemistry, etc.

Ability to work collaboratively in a team environment with people at all levels in an organization
Passion for research and analytics works

proficient communication capability in English

Shape your future through impact that matters

For more than 100 years of history, Deloitte witnessed also had the honor to be part of the economic boom in China by providing industry-leading audit & assurance, consulting, risk advisory, financial advisory, tax & business advisory services to nearly 90% of the Fortune Global 500 Chinese companies and thousands of private companies. Deloitte China today carries on our centenary professionalism and strives to become the undisputed leader in professional services in China with strong responsibility and capabilities in digitalization and multidisciplinary services.
Deloitte has been named China's Top Employer since 2006, Universum's Most Attractive Employer in China since 2008, and the Best Workplaces in Greater China since 2019.

All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment regardless of their background, experience, identity, ability or thinking style, and if you need assistance during the application process for accessibility reasons this is available upon request. head: 财务bp
info: 中国 北京市 · 1 个月前 · 15 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
1. 负责对公司的财务数据进行深入分析，提供财务报告和经营建议，支持业务决策；
2. 监控和分析公司的财务表现，识别财务风险，提出改进建议，优化财务管理流程；

4. 参与预算编制与执行监控，确保财务资源的有效分配与使用，提升公司的财务健康度；
5. 跟踪财务领域的最新动态和法规变化，确保公司财务活动的合规性，维护公司的财务安全。
任职要求
1. 教育背景
学历要求：本科及以上学历，财务、会计、经济学或相关专业；
2. 工作经验
工作经验：5年以上财务分析、预算管理或相关领域的工作经验；
3. 能力要求：
技术能力：熟练掌握财务分析、预算编制、成本控制等财务管理技能；精通Excel等财务软件的使用；
业务理解：具备良好的业务敏感度，能够准确理解公司业务需求，提供有效的财务支持和建议；
沟通协调：具备出色的沟通能力，能够与各部门高效沟通，协调解决财务相关问题；
数据分析：具备较强的数据分析能力，能够从大量数据中提取有价值的信息，为公司决策提供支持；
4. 基本素质
团队协作：具备良好的团队合作精神，能够在多元化团队中有效工作；
问题解决：具备独立分析和解决问题的能力，能够面对复杂的财务问题提出有效的解决方案；
责任心：具有强烈的责任心，对工作认真负责，能够承担一定的工作压力；
创新思维：具备创新意识，关注财务管理领域的新趋势，能够不断学习和探索新方法，提升财务管理效率。
符合京东价值观：客户为先、创新、拼搏、担当、感恩、诚信。

head: AI Product manager
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 1 个月前 · 80 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
About the Company

Noah Holdings is Asia's leading independent wealth management institution, listed on both Hong Kong and US stock exchanges. The company specializes in providing global financial portfolio management and comprehensive wealth planning services to high-net-worth individuals. We have accumulated over 20 years of industry experience and a substantial client base.
Mission Statement

Drive Noah Holdings' digital transformation in the AI era. Through technology enablement, we will reshape our customer acquisition, operations, and service systems, building a new wealth management paradigm centered on "data-driven insights and user experience excellence." This will drive simultaneous growth in business scale and customer loyalty.
Background & Opportunity

As we expand globally, we are fundamentally reimagining how we serve clients. This requires leveraging AI technology to scale services while maintaining the personalized, high-touch experience that defines our brand. The ideal candidate is an analytical team player who will lead the AI product strategy and execution across the organization. You will own the entire product lifecycle from strategy to evaluation, work cross-functionally to complete product roadmaps, and discover new AI opportunities that drive business value.
Core Responsibilities

1. Online Customer Journey Design - Lead the design of end-to-end customer journeys based on behavioral data and financial scenarios. Build a closed-loop product system spanning "prospect identification → personalized engagement → long-term relationship management."

2. AI Application Implementation - Spearhead deployment of AI solutions including intelligent investment advisory, customer segmentation & profiling, and automated marketing tools to improve lead conversion and customer engagement.

3. Cross-Functional Collaboration - Bridge business and technology teams, translating financial expertise into scalable digital solutions. Drive alignment between product vision and technical execution.

4. Agile Product Development - Lead or participate in agile development cycles, ensuring rapid iteration and data-driven decision-making. Establish key performance indicators (customer lifetime value, conversion funnels, retention rates) and use data insights to optimize operations.
5. Business Model Innovation - Explore new online engagement models to reduce reliance on traditional offline channels, improve operational efficiency, and optimize resource utilization.
6. Product Metrics & Analytics - Design and monitor core metrics throughout the customer lifecycle, using data-driven insights to continuously optimize operational strategies and product performance.
Experience & Background

1. 3-8 years of product management or operations experience at leading internet companies or fintech firms, with hands-on experience building or restructuring consumer-facing products from scratch or through major overhauls
2. Finance industry background (wealth management, securities) is a plus; understanding of compliance frameworks and high-net-worth customer dynamics is valuable
3. Global mindset and cross-cultural collaboration capability
Core Competencies
1. User Insight & Design - Proficiency with user research methodologies and customer journey mapping. Ability to precisely identify pain points and design solutions.
2. Data Acumen - SQL/Python proficiency. Capable of independently extracting, analyzing data, and deriving actionable insights.
3. AI & Technology Fluency - Understanding of AI application principles and machine learning fundamentals. Ability to communicate effectively with technical teams about technical approaches.
4. Commercial Mindset - High business acumen focused on ROI and scale. Ability to balance user experience with business growth objectives.
5. Adaptability & Innovation - Willingness to challenge status quo. Comfortable operating in ambiguity and driving change in a traditional industry.
Why Join Noah Holdings
Pioneering Opportunity
- Participate in a strategic transformation of a traditional finance company. Direct involvement in company-defining projects with significant business impact.
Strong Support System
- Access to integrated customer data, research & investment expertise, dedicated AI technology teams, and committed budget allocation.
Growth Trajectory
- Develop horizontally across finance domains while deepening expertise in product and technology innovation. Build a rare combination of financial acumen and digital product excellence.

head: Record to Report Analyst
info: 中国 辽宁省 大连市 · 重新发布时间: 1 周前 · 7 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Analyst Period End and Accounting

The Dyson Business Services (DBS) organisation provides process and service excellence to support Dyson’s growth ambitions with a goal of innovating and enhancing services over time to meet the changing needs of the business.
About The Role

As a Period End and Accounting Analyst, you will join the Record to Report (RTR) Specialist team within our finance operations. We are seeking an individual with at least 2 years of relevant experience and proficiency in both Korean and English. In this role, you will be responsible for managing comprehensive RTR processes, including bank statement processing, reconciliations, month-end closing, inventory and fixed asset accounting, as well as intercompany transaction processing and reconciliations.

You will also prepare and post journal entries, support financial reporting and analysis, and assist with audit preparation by providing required documentation. The ideal candidate will have a Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline
hands-on experience with SAP (FI module), OneStream, and Blackline

and strong expertise in intercompany accounting, bank reconciliation, and fixed asset processes. Proficiency in Microsoft Excel, strong attention to detail, analytical skills, and excellent communication and interpersonal skills are essential. Audit support experience and the ability to work collaboratively with cross-functional teams in a dynamic, international environment are also required.
Key Responsibilities
Manage and execute all RTR activities, including bank statement processing, reconciliations, and month-end closing tasks.
Oversee accounting tasks related to inventory and fixed assets, from capitalization to disposal.
Process and reconcile intercompany transactions, including netting and balance confirmations.
Prepare and post journal entries, including mass reversals and corrections as required.
Support regular and ad-hoc financial reporting and analysis.
Contribute to audit preparation and provide necessary documentation for internal and external auditors.
Maintain accurate records and ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards.
Collaborate effectively with cross-functional teams, both locally and internationally.
Qualifications And Skills
Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related discipline.
Proficiency in Korean and English (spoken and written) is mandatory.
Minimum 2 years of experience in RTR or related finance and accounting processes.
Hands-on experience with SAP (FI module), OneStream, and Blackline preferred.
Strong knowledge of intercompany accounting, bank reconciliation, and fixed asset processes.
Proficiency in Microsoft Excel and data analysis.
High attention to detail, strong analytical skills, and ability to meet deadlines.
Experience in supporting internal and external audits.
Excellent communication and interpersonal skills.

Dyson is an equal opportunity employer. We know that great minds don’t think alike, and it takes all kinds of minds to make our technology so unique. We welcome applications from all backgrounds and employment decisions are made without regard to race, colour, religion, national or ethnic origin, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, age, disability, protected veteran status or other any other dimension of diversity.
1. Manage and execute all RTR activities, including bank statement processing, reconciliations, and month-end closing tasks.
2. Oversee accounting tasks related to inventory and fixed assets, from capitalization to disposal.
3. Process and reconcile intercompany transactions, including netting and balance confirmations.
4. Prepare and post journal entries, including mass reversals and corrections as required.
5. Support regular and ad-hoc financial reporting and analysis.
6. Contribute to audit preparation and provide necessary documentation for internal and external auditors.
7. Maintain accurate records and ensure compliance with company policies and accounting standards.

company_box_content: Dyson solves real-world problems and creates better products through the application of engineering, science, design and creativity. It is a family-owned, global technology company, founded by Sir James Dyson who remains at the helm alongside his son Jake.

Since inventing the first cyclonic bagless vacuum cleaner, the DC01, Dyson has consistently invested in research and development to improve its products and technologies radically. Dyson offers products across a growing range of areas: floorcare, air purification, robotics, haircare including formulations, lighting, hand drying, and most recently audio. Dyson continues to expand into new areas.

Today, Dyson sells products in more than 80 markets, has 450 Dyson stores worldwide and is available in all major technology and beauty retailers. Dyson has global headquarters in Singapore and major technology campuses in Singapore, the UK, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Its global team of engineers, scientists and software developers are focused on developing technology-enabled products which work better and which people love to use. Key areas of focus have included high-speed electric digital motors, sensing and vision systems, robotics, machine learning and aerodynamics.

Beyond products, to encourage an inventive future, Dyson is also inspiring the next generation of engineers and inventors through the Dyson Institute of Engineering and Technology, the James Dyson Foundation and the James Dyson Award.

The Dyson family applies its problem-solving approach in other fields, and established Dyson Farming in 2012. It is one of the largest farming businesses in the UK, extending to 36,000 acres across Lincolnshire, Oxfordshire, Gloucestershire and Somerset. It is a family-owned enterprise unlike any other, focussed on long-term investment in British farming and the countryside to grow tasty and nutritious food.

supply chain studies

company_box_content: Evalueserve is a global company that leverages technology-enhanced managed services to enhance and accelerate decision-making. At Evalueserve, we are committed to offering our employees an inclusive and empowering workplace. Our diversity, equity, and inclusion programs ensure all employees, regardless of their nationality, background, gender, or other aspects of their identity, can develop professionally. We provide career development programs and opportunities that enable employees to meet evolving market needs while learning, growing, and taking pride in their work.

Evalueserve has been recognized as a leading vendor by several entities including Forrester in both its Customer Analytics and Market & Competitive Intelligence reports and Chartis Research in its Risktech100 2024 and Credit Lending Operations 2024 awards.

The Hong Kong Trade Development Council (“HKTDC”), the statutory organisation promoting Hong Kong’s external trade, seeks a dynamic and high caliber candidate to join our Shanghai Office.
Marketing Executive (Shanghai Office)
Job Responsibilities
1. 策劃並執行貿發局在華東地區 (主要以上海、安徽為主）舉辦的各項活動
2. 策劃並執行貿發局在香港舉辦的各項活動

The successful candidate will be appointed on a fixed-term contract basis, renewable subject to operational needs. Salary will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
Application Procedure

If you want to join our team, please complete the application form on our website https://phf.tbe.taleo.net/phf01/ats/careers/v2/viewRequisition?org=HKTDC&cws=45&rid=3566 Those who do not hear from us within EIGHT WEEKS after the closing date may assume their applications were unsuccessful

All information provided by applicants will be treated in strict confidence and used only for recruitment purposes. Applicants may be considered for other suitable positions within the Limited. Their personal data will be destroyed six months after the selection is finalised.

head: Legal Services Data Collection Analyst - China
info: 中国 上海市 上海市 · 重新发布时间: 3 天前 · 32 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Major Accountabilities And Responsibilities
In this role you will be responsible for:

Technical execution of standardized data collection procedures, managing tasks and timelines to ensure the quality and integrity of evidence in support of lawsuits, internal investigations, or compliance requirements
Organize your workload to efficiently execute multiple and sometimes competing requests
Process, transfer, and maintain collected data in accordance with legal requirements and team protocols
Prepare clear, concise, and accurate written documentation of procedures and outcomes.

Closely coordinate with internal and global stakeholders including project managers, colleagues, attorneys, and compliance investigators by providing timely updates and communicating any issues or delays.
Work closely with business and IT resources to define eDiscovery playbook requirements
When needed, escalate technical problems to your manager and work with IT and cloud platform providers to resolve collection and transfer challenges.
Key Tasks Include

Utilize collection and processing tools, including platforms like Microsoft Purview, Encase, Cellebrite and command-line utilities, to gather data from sources such as Microsoft 365 Exchange, company-shared drives, mobile devices, HR and finance systems, and other digital repositories.
Ensure all steps are properly tracked, results documented, and documentation handed off to support downstream legal review or compliance investigations.
Assist with the normalization, extraction, and organization of data, including metadata and text, for use in review or litigation platforms such as Relativity or Nuix Discover.
Minimum Requirements
Education, Qualifications, Skills and Experience
Must haves
Bachelor’s degree or higher in a relevant field (e.g., computer science, information technology, engineering, data management, law, or related discipline)
At least 2 years of experience in investigations, eDiscovery, operating legal technology, forensic collections, cybersecurity or other fields related to technical aspects of eDiscovery
Understanding of key eDiscovery concepts such as how we extract and use metadata
Technical background, including education and/or experience of eDiscovery
Demonstrated ability to execute and document technical procedures with accuracy
Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage multiple concurrent tasks
Ability to appropriately troubleshoot technical issues and escalate obstacles to management
Solid written and verbal communication in English
Demonstrated ability to quickly master new software and digital tools
Ability to work effectively as part of a global team with members across several time zones
Analytical mindset and good judgment regarding data integrity and security
Preferable
Work history in the pharmaceutical, biotechnology, or healthcare industry
Expertise (at least familiarity) with Relativity and/or Nuix Discover (formerly called Ringtail)
Ability to create and run SQL queries and stored procedures
Prior experience working with legal technology

head: Product Manager, BCP
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 21 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

The Exchange Business Continuity Plan (BCP) Product Specialist is responsible for developing, maintaining, and optimizing the exchange's Business Continuity Plan. This ensures the continuous operation of critical business functions during any disruption event. They collaborate with cross-departmental teams to assess risks, design mitigation measures, and guarantee the effectiveness of the Business Continuity Plan
1. Develop and maintain the exchange's Business Continuity Plan, including disaster recovery and emergency response plans
2. Identify and assess risks that may impact exchange operations, including technical failures, market volatility, and external events
3. Design and implement risk mitigation measures to reduce the impact of potential disruptions
4. Organize and conduct training and drills for the Business Continuity Plan, ensuring all employees understand their roles and responsibilities in emergency situations
5. Collaborate with Technology, Operations, Compliance, and Legal teams to ensure the comprehensiveness and effectiveness of the Business Continuity Plan

6. During a disruption event, be responsible for communication with internal and external stakeholders, ensuring timely and accurate information dissemination to maintain the exchange's reputation and customer trust
1. Bachelor's degree in Risk Management, Emergency Management, Computer Engineering, or a related field. A Master's degree or professional certification (e.g., CBCP, CBPRP) is preferred
2. Over 5 years of experience in product manager or related roles focused on risk control or business continuity planning within the financial services industry
3. Familiarity with the business rules of the cryptocurrency exchange domain and accumulated experience in managing common risk scenarios
4. Possess a foundational understanding of system architecture, with the ability to deliver highly productized business solutions
5. Strong project management skills and cross-departmental collaboration capabilities
6. High sense of responsibility for the stable operation of business and systems
7. Possess systematic thinking skills, adept at analyzing potential risk control issues within business processes
8. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills, with proficiency in English as a working language
company_box_content: Futu Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: FUTU) is a leading fintech company committed to transforming the investing experience for investors worldwide. company_box_content: The first business of Alibaba Group, Alibaba.com (www.alibaba.com) is the leading platform for global wholesale trade serving millions of buyers and suppliers around the world. Through Alibaba.com, small businesses can sell their products to companies in other countries. Sellers on Alibaba.com are typically manufacturers and distributors based in China and other manufacturing countries such as India, Pakistan, the United States and Thailand.
Our Mission

As part of the Alibaba Group, our mission is to make it easy to do business anywhere.  We do this by giving suppliers the tools necessary to reach a global audience for their products, and by helping buyers find products and suppliers quickly and efficiently.
One-Stop Sourcing
Alibaba.com brings you hundreds of millions of products in over 40 different major categories, including consumer electronics, machinery and apparel.
Buyers for these products are located in 190+ countries and regions, and exchange hundreds of thousands of messages with suppliers on the platform each day.
Anytime, Anywhere
As a platform, we continue to develop services to help businesses do more and discover new opportunities.
Whether it’s sourcing from your mobile phone or contacting suppliers in their local language, turn to Alibaba.com for all your global business needs.

head: 经营分析师
info: 中国 北京市 · 1 个月前 · 21 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

我们正在寻找一位资深且具备强大技术驱动力的经营分析师加入京东国际CFO架构下的业务团队。您不仅需要深厚的财务分析功底，更需要具备搭建自动化财务数据体系的视野与能力。您将作为关键纽带，连接财务与业务，通过数据洞察驱动战略决策，并主导或参与财务数据分析与报告的自动化、系统化建设，全面提升财务管理的效率与前瞻性。如果您拥有国际物流或相关行业的经营分析经验，并对用技术手段革新财务工作充满热情，我们诚挚期待您的加入。
岗位职责及目标：
1. 负责搭建公司自动化财务数据的分析与报告体系：通过深入分析财务数据，设计并推动自动化报告解决方案，为管理层提供高效、准确的决策支持，助力战略制定。
2. 监控和分析公司的财务表现：独立跟踪财务核心指标，识别潜在的业务与财务风险点，提出切实可行的改进建议，持续优化财务管理流程。
3. 深度融入业务，提供前瞻性财务支持：与各业务部门紧密合作，深入理解业务逻辑与需求，确保财务数据的准确性、及时性，并成为业务发展的财务伙伴。
4. 全面参与预算管理闭环：负责或参与年度预算编制、月度/季度滚动预测及执行跟踪，分析偏差原因，确保预算的合理性与有效性，提升公司整体财务健康度。
5. 推动财务管理专业化与智能化：跟踪行业动态与最佳实践，探索并引入先进的财务管理理念、工具与方法，提升团队的专业能力和运营效率。
任职要求：
1. 学历背景：本科及以上学历，财务、会计、经济学、管理学等相关专业优先。（本科须为国内院校）
2. 工作经验：具备7年以上财务分析、商业分析或相关领域工作经验。具备国际物流、供应链或跨境电商行业经营分析经验者将获得优先考虑。
3. 核心技术能力：
必须熟练使用SQL，能够独立进行复杂数据查询、提取与处理，为分析工作奠定数据基础。
精通Excel等数据处理工具，具备强大的数据分析能力，能从海量数据中提炼商业洞见。
有财务系统、BI工具（如Power BI, Tableau）实施或自动化报表搭建经验者更佳。
4. 业务理解力：具备优秀的商业敏感度，能快速理解业务运作模式，将财务数据与业务实际紧密结合，提供有价值的决策支持。
5. 沟通与协作：具备出色的跨部门沟通能力和团队协作精神，能够清晰传达财务观点，推动跨团队项目高效落地。
6. 分析与解决问题能力：具备卓越的逻辑分析能力，能独立对复杂财务问题进行深度剖析，并形成结构化的解决方案与建议。
7. 抗压能力：适应快节奏、高强度的工作环境，能在压力下保持稳定的输出和高度的责任感。
8. 价值观：认同并践行客户为先、创新、拼搏、担当、感恩、诚信的京东价值观。
9. 加分项：具备良好的英语书面及口语沟通能力者优先。
company_box_content: 京东于2004年正式涉足电商领域，2018年，京东集团市场交易额接近1.7万亿元*。2019年7月，京东集团第四次入榜《财富》全球500强，位列第139位，是中国线上线下最大的零售集团。
2014年5月，京东集团在美国纳斯达克证券交易所正式挂牌上市，是中国第一个成功赴美上市的大型综合型电商平台。2015年7月，京东凭借高成长性入选纳斯达克100指数和纳斯达克100平均加权指数。
2019年前三个季度，京东集团净收入达4062亿元，非美国通用会计准则下（Non-GAAP）归属于普通股股东的净利润近100亿元，创历史最高纪录；研发投入超过130亿元，跃升为中国企业中对技术投入最多的公司之一。
京东集团定位于“以供应链为基础的技术与服务企业”，目前业务已涉及零售、数字科技、物流、技术服务、健康、保险、物流地产、云计算、AI和海外等领域，其中核心业务为零售、数字科技、物流、技术服务四大板块。
京东集团奉行客户为先 、诚信、 协作、 感恩 、拼搏 、担当的价值观，目标是成为全球最值得信赖的企业。

About Umicore

Reducing harmful vehicle emissions. Powering the cars of the future. Giving new life to used metals. We are the leading circular materials technology company fulfilling its mission to create materials for a better life. With ambitions like this, imagine what you could do?

A global organisation. It’s not just those in our industrial sites and technical centres that are vital to Umicore’s growth. Across our support functions we ensure that we continue to grow and evolve – whether it’s by making sure our decisions are commercially viable, enhancing our reputation, building new customer relationships or finding the right people who can build on what we’ve already achieved. head: Marketing Associate
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 6 天前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Adjust, an AppLovin (NASDAQ:
APP

) company, is trusted by marketers around the world to measure and grow their apps across platforms, from mobile to CTV and beyond. Adjust works with companies at every stage of the app marketing journey, from fast-growing digital brands to brick-and-mortar companies launching their first apps. Adjust’s powerful measurement and analytics solutions provide visibility, insights and essential tools that drive better results.
#Ad
Make An Impact/ The Role

Adjust is looking for a passionate Marketing Associate in our Beijing office. We are seeking a proactive forward-thinking, marketing savvy “go-getter”. This person will be a key member of the marketing team and will help raise brand awareness through various core marketing channels throughout China. He/she will play a crucial role in driving marketing operations by helping with Adjust-hosted and co-hosted events and conferences, and aiding in the management of our local social media channels.
Responsibilities
Coordinate marketing events including event planning, registrations, sponsorship fulfillment, on-site execution, after-event follow-up, and event ROI report.
Connect events from beginning to end with internal and external stakeholders. Draft event communications, build registration pages, and event social media planning.
Help manage and drive creative campaigns in Adjust’s Official Wechat Accounts (subscription account, service account and WeChat channel) and content pipeline.
Maintain relationships with external vendors, freelancers and agencies, and ensure quality control.
Responsible for distributing, organizing, and restocking staff swag, customer gifts, and special event swag items.
Monitor competitive intelligence and market trends.
Assist in managing local partnerships.
Keep close communication and work with the HQ marketing team when needed.

head: Specialist - Supply Chain & IT Commercial
info: 中国 北京市 · 1 个月前 · 35 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
The Specialist – Supply Chain & IT Commercial is responsible for

• The development and documentation of targeted category specific Sourcing and Contracting strategies in support of IT and Supply Chain including elements related to China, global sourcing and supplier capability development framework.
• Support IT and Supply Chain in governance activities on end-to-end requirements from sourcing to contract management in MMG.
• As appropriate, lead and deliver corporate sourcing and contract management activities in collaboration with IT.

To achieve this, the Specialist –Supply Chain & IT Commercial requires direct experience and capability across the range of skills of both IT Commercial and Supply Chain, with enhanced capability in stakeholder engagement and influence and written communication skills, in both English and Mandarin.
Specific accountabilities and activities of the role include:
Planning and Prioritising
• Work with Supply Chain peers, IT and other stakeholders to forecast requirements 1-5 years out
• Taking cognisance of IT/stakeholder requirements, the Sourcing and Contracting process and the degree of workload intensity required for each requirement, create work plans/schedules to be executed
• Prioritise activities across concurrent initiatives, monitor progress to milestones and deliverables and seek support as required to ensure strategic opportunities are maximised
• After developing and considering options, escalate unresolved resource requirements/conflicts
Development of Category strategies and related documentation
• Engaging MMG and external subject matter experts, to:
o Assess and confirm internal requirements
o Identify and assess external supply options, including
 Emerging or disruptive innovations and/or technologies
 China or other ‘best cost’ country alternatives
 Local sourcing in support of MMG’s license to operate
 Potential for unplanned incidents to interrupt the sustainability of the supply chain

• In consideration of internal requirements and external options, establish the optimal ‘route to market’, preferred risk apportionment between MMG and 3rd parties and preferred contract structures and mechanisms

• Develop and document resulting Category strategies, ensuring they represent a consensus view, trade-offs and implementation requirements which site can leverage for their regional category or sourcing strategies
• Submit finalized Category strategies for approval by the global Supply Chain Leadership Team
Support of Sourcing and Contracting strategy execution

• Working with and supporting site Sourcing and Contracting teams, when a requirement covered by an approved strategy becomes current, and ensure the site Sourcing and Contracting team execute the market engagement, negotiation and contracting in line with the approved strategy
• Input into and support of data and analytics required for Sourcing and Contracting Strategies and functional improvement
• Source and analyse appropriate MMG data and external data on a regular basis to
o Track compliance to existing contracts
o Allocate spend to the appropriate category taxonomy
o Aggregate spend in normalized vendor structures
o Track cost driver trend movements and inform MMG stakeholders of the potential impact
• Use analysed data and subsequent category specific insights to inform category strategies, market engagement approach required contract mechanisms
General
• Ensure work done in the team meets all compliance requirements established through MMG Standards, WQR’s, Procedures and Work Instructions
• Establish, develop and foster relationships with cross-functional peers and stakeholders, ensuring mutual understanding of requirements
• Proactively engage cross functional peers and stakeholders to identify and implement improvements and enhancements to systems and processes
Skills:
• Ability to plan, prioritise, adapt, and assist others to manage to changing requirements
o Understand key stakeholder plans, and interpret impact on planning, prioritisation and delivery of high quality outcomes within the required timelines.
o Identify, resolve and/or escalate schedule issues while managing a large volume of concurrent projects.
o Resilience to adapt and assist others to adapt to changing requirements and circumstances
• Ability to develop strong relationships with both internal and external stakeholders
o Development of a position of expertise over category, supplier and sourcing option development
o Establish and lead a cross-functional team to develop long-term category, supplier and sourcing strategies
o Collaborate and facilitation with internal stakeholders in pursuit of maximum sustainable value for MMG
o Recognition as a trusted advisor through consistent provision of high quality category, supplier and sourcing strategies
• Strong written communication skills in English and Mandarin, with focus on:
o Documenting thorough, concise and compelling category and or supplier development strategy and other governance documents
o High quality drafting of contracts and associated schedules,
• Ability to plan and execute sourcing activities and negotiation strategies
o Contribute technical expertise in support of managers and site supply teams in developing sourcing and negotiation capability
o Lead cross-functional teams in the selection, development and execution of appropriate sourcing strategies
o Enhance sourcing outcomes through both verbal and written delivery of negotiation messages
o Development of risk management strategies for sourcing activities
o Use of SAP, Ariba or similar ERP system(s) to complete sourcing activities
• Ability to conduct analysis of the cost and capability of MMG’s suppliers and supply markets
o Accurately conduct complex commercial analysis, including ability to assess total cost of ownership
o Analyse and interpret supply markets and MMG demand for goods and services
o Monitor changing consumption trends in the market which are relevant to the category
• Proficiency in use of MS Office, in particular strong competency in MS Excel as an enabler for data analysis and MS Word for documentation of strategies
• Bilingual (English and Mandarin)
Experience:

• 5-10 years’ experience in Procurement or Supply Chain Sourcing or Category Management roles. (Alternative relevant experience in multiple IT categories, including: IT outsourcing services, Hardware included Laptop/Desktop, Servers, Mid-range Hardware, Storage, Telecom, Network Hardware, On-prem Datacentre, Mainstream Cloud services, Application Software and etc.
• Experience in strategic sourcing or developing commercial arrangements and capture of outcomes in contract documentation
• Proven ability to identify and deliver total cost reduction and efficiency opportunities
company_box_content: Founded in 2009, MMG’s vision is to create a leading international mining company for a low carbon future. We mine to create wealth for our people, host communities and shareholders with an ambition to grow and diversify our resource, production and value, by leveraging Chinese and International expertise.
We are guided by our Code of Conduct and our values of thinking safety first, respecting each other, working together, doing what we say and wanting to be better.
We are committed to responsible environmental and social performance and effective governance of our operations.
We operate and develop copper, zinc and other base metals projects across Australia, the Democratic Republic of the Congo and Peru.
Headquartered in Melbourne, Australia, we are listed on the Hong Kong Stock Exchange (HKEx 1208) with an international shareholder base.
A long-term outlook, our pride in mining, our commitment to shared international standards and our respect for people, land and culture underpins our success.
We are MMG and we mine for progress.

info: 中国 上海市 · 1 个月前 · 31 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

We are seeking a highly motivated and analytical professional to join our APAC team to drive excellence in demand planning and S&OP processes. Reporting to the Operations Director, APAC - this role plays a key part in coordinating regional forecasts, supporting data-driven decision-making, and enhancing forecast accuracy across multiple markets. The ideal candidate is a proactive team player with strong communication skills, a keen eye for detail, and the ability to thrive in a dynamic, matrixed organization. The position will also require
travel between Suzhou and Shanghai to collaborate closely with cross-functional teams and stakeholders.
Main Responsibilities
1. Coordinate, support, and consolidate the monthly rolling 12-month forecast for all IG businesses across Asia Pacific.
2. Upload the regional rolling forecast into the IBP system.
3. Lead and facilitate the APAC S&OP Demand Review meetings.
4. Oversee and standardize regional forecast reporting processes, ensuring timely and consistent monthly updates.
5. Provide analytical support to enhance forecast accuracy and identify opportunities for continuous improvement.
6. Support APAC-wide S&OP initiatives and related projects.
Requirements
1. Bachelor’s degree in Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related discipline
2. Minimum of 5 years of progressive experience in supply chain functions including planning, procurement, and demand analysis.
3. Prior experience in a manufacturing environment is highly desirable.
4. Excellent communication and interpersonal skills with strong command of English, with the ability to collaborate effectively across diverse teams and functions.
5. Strong analytical, problem-solving, and critical-thinking capabilities.
6. Demonstrated negotiation skills with the ability to influence and achieve win-win outcomes.
7. Proven experience in leading change initiatives within a complex and highly matrixed organization.
8. Advanced proficiency in Microsoft Excel and PowerPoint.
9. Hands-on experience with JDE or other ERP systems.
10. Willingness to travel frequently between Suzhou and Shanghai as part of regional collaboration and business coordination.

info: 中国 新疆维吾尔自治区 伊州区 · 重新发布时间: 3 天前 · 8 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
We are seeking a Assistant Data Program Manager.
As an Assistant Data Program Manager your main responsibilities will involve:
Act as the local owner and coordinator of data/AI initiatives.
Implement and localize data solutions, tools, and systems developed by the regional or group data teams.
Identify opportunities to leverage global/regional data products to solve local business challenges and drive adoption.
Partner with business stakeholders to translate needs into actionable data initiatives.
Manage project plans, timelines, and communication between local business units and regional data teams.
Collaborate closely with regional and global stakeholders to ensure alignment and smooth integration of group data/AI tools.
Track program KPIs, prepare executive updates, and ensure timely, high-quality delivery of data initiatives.

Serve as a data ambassador, building enthusiasm for data-driven decision-making within teams. Promote group data solutions, champion data use cases, and increase data literacy and awareness across business units.
Foster collaboration between data engineering, analytics, and business teams to ensure seamless integration of solutions.
Maintain and enhance existing Python-based tools and automations developed in previous projects.
Your Skills And Experience
As an Assistant Data Program Manager your skills and qualifications will ideally include:
Master degree in Computer Science, Data Science, Statistics, or a related field, and 6+ years of experience in data project or program management, preferably in a multinational or regional context.
Strong understanding of data ecosystems, including data pipelines, warehousing, and analytics platforms.
Proficiency in Python for maintaining and enhancing existing tools.
Experience with data visualization and BI tools (Power BI, Tableau, or similar).
Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to collaborate across regional and group structures.
Fluent in English
knowledge of Cantonese or Mandarin is an advantage.
Why Zurich
At Zurich, we like to think outside the box and challenge the status quo. We take an optimistic approach by focusing on the positives and constantly asking What can go right?
We are an equal opportunity employer who knows that each employee is unique - that’s what makes our team so great!
Join us as we constantly explore new ways to
protect our customers and the planet

head: Quantitative Researcher – Mid-Frequency Strategies
info: 中国 · 1 个月前 · 78 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 尚无可用回复洞察
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Role:
Quantitative Researcher – Mid-Frequency Strategies
Location:
1. This role is remote-friendly for candidates based in China. Relocation to Ireland (along with visa application) is possible for the right candidate.
Description
Whistler Trading is building a research-first trading team focused on alpha generation in global futures and equities markets. We are hiring a
Quantitative Researcher
with a strong statistical foundation and hands-on experience developing
mid-frequency (MFT)
strategies — where holding periods span
minutes to overnight
and trading decisions are driven by data, not intuition.
This role is for a candidate who thrives in the early stages of strategy development:
cleaning data, testing hypotheses, modeling signals
, and working closely with engineers and traders to turn research into production-ready systems. Your goal isn’t to chase noise — it’s to extract stable, repeatable edge from complex data.
The Mission
1. Research, design, and validate short to mid-frequency alpha strategies in futures and equities.
2. Work with large-scale market, fundamental, and alternative datasets.
3. Build forecasting models with statistical rigor and careful out-of-sample evaluation.
4. Partner with engineers to take strategies from prototype to production.
5. Monitor live performance and iterate to reduce decay and improve robustness.
6. Stay current on market structure, liquidity conditions, and statistical modeling techniques.
The Skills and Qualifications
1. 3+ years of experience in quantitative research at a strong trading firm, ideally focused on mid-frequency strategies (HFT also considered)
2. Strong background in statistics, machine learning, or time-series modeling (PHD is a plus).
3. Hands-on experience with futures and/or equities across global markets.
4. Proficient in Python; familiarity with C++ or Rust is a bonus.
5. Familiar with research workflows: walk-forward testing, overfitting avoidance, and model validation.
6. Comfortable working with large datasets and conducting exploratory data analysis.
7. Bonus: You’ve taken a strategy from research to live trading and managed performance in production.
8. Bonus: Familiarity with monetization, execution modeling, slippage estimation, or transaction cost analysis.
9. Spoken and written English
The Compensation
1. Base Salary: Very Competitive (depending on experience)
2. Bonuses: Discretionary and performance-linked, based on live alpha contribution and collaboration
This is a high-impact role for a research-driven thinker who wants to extract real edge in
liquid, competitive markets
. You’ll be part of a lean, intellectually rigorous team building strategies that scale — with a clear link between your work and real capital at play.
company_box_content: Quantitative Proprietary Trading Firm

head: Trainee Inspection Engineer – Join the Next Gen Program!
info: 中国 上海市 · 1 个月前 · 86 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Start your career in Shanghai with a traineeship that shows you the world!
At Intero Integrity, you’ll work with cutting-edge robotics and data solutions, travel to unique locations worldwide, and grow into a fully qualified
Inspection Engineer
in 2 years. From day one, you’ll receive a competitive salary, training, and plenty of opportunities to advance your career internationally.
Trainee Inspection Engineer – Join the Next Gen Program!
Location:
Shanghai (shared office)
Be part of the next generation!

Intero Integrity is a fast-growing, global company combining high-tech inspection technology, industrial and environmental services, and smart data solutions. Using our own developed equipment, we inspect pipelines, heaters, and storage tanks for clients worldwide, both onshore and offshore. This helps the energy industry use natural resources safely, efficiently, and responsibly.

Our Shanghai office is a small and dynamic team consisting of a Country Manager (also Sales Manager), two Inspection Engineers, and an open position for an Office Assistant. As a Trainee, you will be part of this close-knit team, working independently while being trained through our international Next Gen Program.
About the Next Gen Program

In 2 years, we will train you to become a fully qualified Inspection Engineer. You will start in Shanghai while also joining training sessions at our headquarters in Tricht, the Netherlands. From day one, you’ll participate in international projects under the guidance of experienced engineers, trainers, and a dedicated buddy. You will follow both technical and personal development training, including:
1. ILI 1 & IGI 1
2. Data analysis
3. Soft skills training
4. Safety training
5. Certifications (such as offshore and forklift)
You will learn to operate our unique high-tech inspection tools, such as the Tank UT Explorer Robot.
Your workweek
1. On site (approx. 20 weeks per year with a focus on China, but sometimes worldwide)
2. Travel to client sites across Asia, Europe, and beyond to perform inspections with our high-tech tools. You’ll translate data into initial recommendations and discuss results with the client team.
3. At the office (Shanghai)
4. Prepare inspection tools and support the local team. Thanks to the small office setup, you’ll quickly gain responsibility and independence.
Who we are looking for
1. Technical degree (bachelor, associate degree, or equivalent), graduates welcome
2. Interest in high-tech equipment, data, and robotics
3. Adventurous mindset and willingness to travel internationally
4. Proactive, stress-resistant, and flexible
5. Excellent command of English (must) and Chinese, other languages are a plus
6. Safety and quality conscious, physically able to work in challenging locations
What we offer
1. Paid traineeship from day one with a competitive local salary (based on knowledge and experience)
2. Salary growth during the program when reaching training milestones
3. Variable allowance for on-site projects
4. Performance-based bonus scheme
5. Intensive 2-year training program with extensive hands-on experience (in China and the Netherlands)
6. Fully funded certifications and training
7. Career opportunities towards senior or management positions
8. Dynamic, international work environment – no two days are the same
9. All the tools you need to succeed (laptop, phone, training)
Ready for a unique start to your career?
Soon you could be working on inspection sites in China, the Netherlands, or anywhere else in the world. Apply now and step into an adventure full of technology, data, and international collaboration.
How to apply
Send your application, CV, or LinkedIn profile to
careers@intero-integrity.com
Questions? Contact our Recruiter Veroniek Smits at the same email address.
Please note:
we do not work with recruitment agencies for this position. Should you still wish to suggest a candidate, we thank you in advance for offering your services free of charge.

head: Research Analyst - Power & Renewables, China
info: 中国 北京市 北京市 · 重新发布时间: 2 周前 · 超过 100 位会员点击过“申请”由招聘者推广 ·
job_details_content: ##              职位简介

Wood Mackenzie is the global data and analytics business for the renewables, energy, and natural resources industries. Enhanced by technology. Enriched by human intelligence. In an ever-changing world, companies and governments need reliable and actionable insight to lead the transition to a sustainable future. That’s why we cover the entire supply chain with unparalleled breadth and depth, backed by over 50 years’ experience. Our team of over 2,400 experts, operating across 30 global locations, are enabling customers’ decisions through real-time analytics, consultancy, events and thought leadership. Together, we deliver the insight they need to separate risk from opportunity and make confident decisions when it matters most.
WoodMac.com
Wood Mackenzie Brand Video
Wood Mackenzie Values
Inclusive – we succeed together
Trusting – we choose to trust each other
Customer committed – we put customers at the heart of our decisions
Future Focused – we accelerate change
Curious – we turn knowledge into action

We are looking for a Research Analyst to join Wood Mackenzie’s Power & Renewables team in China. Responsibilities will include conducting original quantitative and qualitative research on the market, and delivering this analysis to clients through written reports, presentations, public speaking, addressing specific customer enquiries and through the delivery of bespoke consulting engagements. You will help with expanding our regional power and renewable research using analytical or quantitative tools. You will aggregate and summarise project level datasets, track market activity, and forecast installation volumes and pricing trends. You will build strong ties with key industry stakeholders and engage with clients and prospects in collaboration with our sales team. You will collaborate with other Wood Mackenzie analysts covering power markets and renewable technologies and commodities in the region to ensure our analysis is robust, integrated and thought-provoking.
Knowledge, Skills And Experience
You have experience working in wind, renewables or power markets industry for 2-3 years.
You are passionate about renewable energy and come with strong knowledge of the sector and markets in China.
You have an analytical mindset and an eye for detail, and you can think outside the box and generate new ideas.
You are comfortable working with common Excel functions and query languages.
You have strong networking skills and can show that you can develop relationships with key industry stakeholders.
You can communicate new ideas and concepts to audiences in an engaging way, both verbally and in writing.
You are a strong team player and a natural self-starter who can work independently.
You are comfortable disrupting your routine, as you will constantly be looking to learn and provide in-depth analysis of industry trends and innovative market dynamics.
Equal Opportunities

We are an equal opportunities employer. This means we are committed to recruiting the best people regardless of their race, colour, religion, age, sex, national origin, disability or protected veteran status. You can find out more about your rights under the law at
www.eeoc.gov
If you are applying for a role and have a physical or mental disability, we will support you with your application or through the hiring process.
1. Inclusive – we succeed together
2. Trusting – we choose to trust each other
3. Customer committed – we put customers at the heart of our decisions
4. Future Focused – we accelerate change
5. Curious – we turn knowledge into action
1. You have experience working in wind, renewables or power markets industry for 2-3 years.
2. You are passionate about renewable energy and come with strong knowledge of the sector and markets in China.
3. You have an analytical mindset and an eye for detail, and you can think outside the box and generate new ideas.
4. You are comfortable working with common Excel functions and query languages.
5. You have strong networking skills and can show that you can develop relationships with key industry stakeholders.
6. You can communicate new ideas and concepts to audiences in an engaging way, both verbally and in writing.
7. You are a strong team player and a natural self-starter who can work independently.
8. You are comfortable disrupting your routine, as you will constantly be looking to learn and provide in-depth analysis of industry trends and innovative market dynamics.
company_box_content: In the middle of the energy transition, businesses and governments are faced with significant challenges. But the pace and scale of change mean every decision is made under mounting pressure.  Now, more than ever, companies need reliable data, analytics and actionable insight.

Wood Mackenzie is the leading global provider of data and analytics solutions for the renewables, energy and natural resources sectors . Wood Mackenzie’s services include data, analytics, insight, events and consultancy.  A trusted partner for over 50 years, Wood Mackenzie’s team has over 2,300 experts across more than 30 global locations who cover the entire supply chain. Wood Mackenzie’s data and analytics empowers energy producers, governments and financial institutions to be confident in their investment decisions in the face of rapidly evolving markets. Part of the Veritas group.

Are you excited about using your
biology
expertise to train the next generation of AI?

At SME Careers, we connect subject-matter experts with flexible, remote opportunities in AI development and training. Join SME Careers on a groundbreaking AI-driven project where your biology knowledge will directly shape how AI systems learn to solve problems and reason in biology. head: Insights Manager – Foresights
info: 中国 广东省 深圳 · 1 个月前 · 82 位申请者由招聘者推广 · 积极审核申请者
job_details_content: ##              职位简介
Principal Accountabilities

1. Manage the identification, design and deployment of research/insights projects within the insights programmes, ensuring stakeholder alignment and deploying appropriate methodologies in line with operating procedures.

2. Manage research & insights brief creation covering all mix elements, advising on business question/action standard definition & recommending appropriate marketing research design to ensure investment is ‘fit for purpose’.

3. Lead the project interface between internal stakeholders (usually brand marketing and/or R&D), research agency and the end-market(s) to ensure adequate project control and provide transparency and guidance to relevant stakeholders to complete projects OTIF.
4. Proactively generate actionable consumer insights and drive communication of these insights to key stakeholders

5. Act as a thinking partner to support and challenge product development thinking: deliver commercially sound, consumer centric thinking based on actionable insight to enable brand & platform development leading to competitive advantage and growth.
6. Proactively demonstrate excellence in analytical thinking and information synthesis, including knowledge and use of data platforms, with the aim to provide an evidenced-based point of view.
7. Drive methodological experimentation where appropriate to meet evolving business and insights needs to deliver consumer insight
8. Share research methodologies best practice and study outcomes across Global Strategy & Foresights and local SP&I to contribute to the continuous evolution of the function.
9. Tirelessly advocate for the consumer & their product / sensorial needs within marketing and the R&D teams
Additional Information
Context/ Environment

New Category products such as e-cigarettes, tobacco heating products and modern oral are a major component of BAT’s development of a range of products that provide much of the enjoyment of smoking without burning tobacco. Through NC, BAT is leading the transformation of the tobacco industry in one of the most dynamic periods of change that the industry has ever encountered.

1. BAT has recently heavily invested into its R&D function across the world to accelerate the breadth and deep of its innovation pipeline. The role of the newly created product foresights function is to:
1. Empower growth through shaping the innovation strategy based on robust consumer, market & business insight/foresight
1. Steer the delivery of the operational plan to effectively meet or exceed the evolving marketing environment & business needs
1. Identify and define new opportunities through expertly combining consumer trends, user-behaviour and understanding of the target consumer

1. This requires a deep understanding of consumers’ moments of need coupled with the ability to turn insight into commercial opportunities, where an insight is defined as a penetrating glimpse below the surface of consumer behavior, one that can be applied to unlock category growth.
Knowledge, Skills and Experience

The Consumer Insights Manager is an experienced consumer research & insights professional with broad category understanding and expertise in consumer understanding and behavior. He/She clearly understands and exploits the necessary interrelationships between functions required to be successful in the role.
Embrace key BAT values especially relevant for I&F, i.e. they need to demonstrate these tangibly and live by these values:
1. Love our Consumers
2. Do the right thing
3. Passion to Win
This role requires an individual with the following attributes and behaviors:
Skills & Experience Profile
1. Educated to degree level in an appropriate subject (Post Graduate Degree in Business Management would be preferable)
2. Strong marketing or market research experience in BAT or a blue-chip consumer goods company or a global market research agency or consultancy - ideally with managerial experience.
3. Proven experience working with technical R&D functions translating consumer opportunities into sharp technical briefs
4. Deeply curious about understanding Consumer behaviour & attitudes and how it relates to Innovation product development
5. Commercial & International marketing acumen (including digital), proven experience in innovation / up-stream strategy.
6. Broad understanding of the influence of macro and micro economic, business, environmental and consumer trends (tobacco and ex-category) and their relationships.
7. Possesses an expert knowledge of marketing and marketing research techniques, their application and limitations.
8. Highly proficient in analytics. Familiar with generic statistical tools and their application.
9. Demonstrable track record of delivering multi-country marketing research & insights projects that have influenced business or shaped strategy beyond merely market research project management.
Desired Behaviours & Attitudes
1. Proactive mindset, self-driven and motivated.
2. Comfortable in matrix organisations, works collaboratively and not fazed by ambiguity.
3. Structured & organised way of thinking.
4. Very strong interpersonal & communication skills, ability to modulate tone and message depending on agenda, stakeholder (seniority) and desired outcome.
5. Problem-solver mindset, constructive.
6. Committed to time scales & attentive to detail.
7. Honest, reliable and with high degree of personal integrity.
8. Treats confidential information with sensitivity & discretion.
9. Develops strong and effective people networks (across all levels of the organisation).
Key Success Factors
1. Builds a reputation as a credible & knowledgeable ‘consumer champion’ who can support business needs without being pedantic or over-technical.
2. Harnesses global insight findings (within category) & ex-category trends to build the emerging picture of the evolving consumer & competitor landscape.
3. Commits to the rigorous delivery of key projects that meet the business goals.

4. Is at ease with working collaboratively in a multi-cultural, multi-disciplinary and cross-functional environment; interacting effortlessly with different stakeholders to ensure timely and effective project outcomes.
5. Demonstrates an in-depth knowledge of BAT governance, operating procedures and methodologies.
6. Is curious, creative, courageous and can identify and communicate breakthrough consumer insights.
Working relationship
Internal / External
Internal
1. Global Insights & Foresights teams (Combustibles, New Categories)
2. New Categories Marketing (Category & Brand Directors, Brand Managers).
3. R&D Managers (e.g. Product Development, Sensory, etc.)
4. Key market Insights Managers
External
1. External research agencies up to Research Director
company_box_content: We are BAT, a leading global consumer goods company driven by a clear purpose: to create A Better Tomorrow™ by Building a Smokeless World.

Founded in 1902, we’ve grown into a truly international business, operating across six continents with a presence in over 180 markets. Our strategic ambition is to become a predominantly smokeless business by 2035**, helping adult smokers transition to scientifically substantiated, reduced-risk*† alternatives.

With a powerful portfolio of global brands, a future-focused strategy, and around 50,000 talented people worldwide, we are committed to accelerating Tobacco Harm Reduction and making cigarettes a thing of the past.
As a leading FTSE company, our operations span three key regions:
🌍 United States of America
🌍 Americas & Europe (AME)
🌍 Asia Pacific, Middle East & Africa (APMEA)
Together, we are building A Better Tomorrow™.
* Based on the weight of evidence and assuming a complete switch from cigarette smoking. These products are not risk free and are addictive.

**Please refer to the cautionary statement contained in the Annual Report and Form 20-F 2024 on p.447 for additional information regarding BAT’s future performance: https://www.bat.com/ar/2024/index.html

† Our Vapour product Vuse (including Alto, Solo, Ciro and Vibe), and certain products, including Velo, Grizzly, Kodiak, and Camel Snus, which are sold in the U.S., are subject to FDA regulation and no reduced-risk claims will be made as to these products without agency clearance.
